tldr: The paper introduces SigmaCollab, a multimodal dataset for physically situated human-AI collaboration in mixed-reality task assistance, featuring 85 sessions of user interactions with an AI agent.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了SigmaCollab，一个用于物理环境中的人机协作的多模态数据集，包括85个用户与AI智能体交互会话，用于混合现实任务辅助。
summary_zh: 我们推出了SigmaCollab，一个支持物理情境下人机协作研究的数据集。该数据集包含85个会话，在这些会话中，未经培训的参与者在混合现实辅助AI代理的引导下，于物理世界中执行程序性任务。SigmaCollab包含一组丰富、多模态的数据流，例如参与者和系统音频、来自头戴式设备的以自我为中心的摄像机视图、深度图、头部、手部和眼动追踪信息，以及事后进行的额外标注。虽然数据集规模相对较小（约14小时），但其应用驱动和交互性质为更贴近现实的人机协作研究带来了新的挑战，并为在该领域运行的各种AI模型提供了更真实的测试环境。在未来的工作中，我们计划利用该数据集为混合现实任务辅助场景中的物理情境协作构建一套基准测试。SigmaCollab可在https://github.com/microsoft/SigmaCollab获取。

title: Knowledge Graph-enhanced Large Language Model for Incremental Game PlayTesting
summary: The rapid iteration and frequent updates of modern video games pose significant challenges to the efficiency and specificity of testing. Although automated playtesting methods based on Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown promise, they often lack structured knowledge accumulation mechanisms, making it difficult to conduct precise and efficient testing tailored for incremental game updates. To address this challenge, this paper proposes a KLPEG framework. The framework constructs and maintains a Knowledge Graph (KG) to systematically model game elements, task dependencies, and causal relationships, enabling knowledge accumulation and reuse across versions. Building on this foundation, the framework utilizes LLMs to parse natural language update logs, identify the scope of impact through multi-hop reasoning on the KG, enabling the generation of update-tailored test cases. Experiments in two representative game environments, Overcooked and Minecraft, demonstrate that KLPEG can more accurately locate functionalities affected by updates and complete tests in fewer steps, significantly improving both playtesting effectiveness and efficiency.
tldr: This paper introduces KLPEG, a Knowledge Graph-enhanced LLM framework for incremental game playtesting, which leverages KG reasoning for update impact analysis and generates tailored test cases, improving testing effectiveness and efficiency.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为KLPEG的知识图谱增强型LLM框架，用于增量游戏Playtesting。该框架利用知识图谱推理进行更新影响分析，并生成定制的测试用例，从而提高测试的有效性和效率。
summary_zh: 现代视频游戏的快速迭代和频繁更新对测试的效率和针对性提出了重大挑战。尽管基于大型语言模型（LLM）的自动化游戏测试方法已显示出前景，但它们通常缺乏结构化的知识积累机制，难以针对增量游戏更新进行精确且高效的定制测试。为了应对这一挑战，本文提出了一种KLPEG框架。该框架构建并维护一个知识图谱（KG），以系统地对游戏元素、任务依赖关系和因果关系进行建模，从而实现跨版本的知识积累和重用。在此基础上，该框架利用LLM解析自然语言更新日志，通过在KG上进行多跳推理来识别影响范围，从而生成针对更新定制的测试用例。在Overcooked和Minecraft两个代表性游戏环境中的实验表明，KLPEG能够更准确地定位受更新影响的功能，并以更少的步骤完成测试，从而显著提高游戏测试的有效性和效率。

title: Agentic AI for Mobile Network RAN Management and Optimization
summary:
Agentic AI represents a new paradigm for automating complex systems by using Large AI Models (LAMs) to provide human-level cognitive abilities with multimodal perception, planning, memory, and reasoning capabilities. This will lead to a new generation of AI systems that autonomously decompose goals, retain context over time, learn continuously, operate across tools and environments, and adapt dynamically. The complexity of 5G and upcoming 6G networks renders manual optimization ineffective, pointing to Agentic AI as a method for automating decisions in dynamic RAN environments. However, despite its rapid advances, there is no established framework outlining the foundational components and operational principles of Agentic AI systems nor a universally accepted definition.
  This paper contributes to ongoing research on Agentic AI in 5G and 6G networks by outlining its core concepts and then proposing a practical use case that applies Agentic principles to RAN optimization. We first introduce Agentic AI, tracing its evolution from classical agents and discussing the progress from workflows and simple AI agents to Agentic AI. Core design patterns-reflection, planning, tool use, and multi-agent collaboration-are then described to illustrate how intelligent behaviors are orchestrated. These theorical concepts are grounded in the context of mobile networks, with a focus on RAN management and optimization. A practical 5G RAN case study shows how time-series analytics and LAM-driven agents collaborate for KPI-based autonomous decision-making.
tldr: This paper explores the application of Agentic AI, powered by Large AI Models, to the optimization of 5G RANs, outlining core design patterns and presenting a case study utilizing time-series analytics and LAM-driven agents for autonomous decision-making.
tldr_zh: 本文探讨了基于大型AI模型的 Agentic AI 在 5G RAN 优化中的应用，概述了核心设计模式，并提出了一个案例研究，该案例研究利用时间序列分析和 LAM 驱动的代理来实现自主决策。
summary_zh:
自主智能（Agentic AI）代表了一种通过利用大型人工智能模型（LAMs）来自动化复杂系统的新范式，赋予系统人类级别的认知能力，包括多模态感知、规划、记忆和推理能力。这将催生新一代人工智能系统，它们能够自主分解目标、随时间保持上下文、持续学习、跨工具和环境运行，并动态适应。5G和即将到来的6G网络的复杂性使得手动优化效率低下，这表明自主智能是自动化动态无线接入网（RAN）环境中决策的一种方法。然而，尽管其发展迅速，但尚未建立一个框架来概述自主智能系统的基本组成部分和运行原则，也没有一个普遍接受的定义。

本文通过概述其核心概念，然后提出一个将自主智能原则应用于无线接入网优化的实际用例，为5G和6G网络中自主智能的持续研究做出贡献。我们首先介绍自主智能，追溯其从经典代理的演变，并讨论从工作流和简单人工智能代理到自主智能的进展。然后描述了核心设计模式——反思、规划、工具使用和多代理协作——以说明如何协调智能行为。这些理论概念在移动网络的背景下进行阐述，重点是无线接入网的管理和优化。一个实际的5G无线接入网案例研究展示了时间序列分析和LAM驱动的代理如何协作以实现基于KPI的自主决策。

title: Automata-Conditioned Cooperative Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
summary: We study the problem of learning multi-task, multi-agent policies for cooperative, temporal objectives, under centralized training, decentralized execution. In this setting, using automata to represent tasks enables the decomposition of complex tasks into simpler sub-tasks that can be assigned to agents. However, existing approaches remain sample-inefficient and are limited to the single-task case. In this work, we present Automata-Conditioned Cooperative Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (ACC-MARL), a framework for learning task-conditioned, decentralized team policies. We identify the main challenges to ACC-MARL's feasibility in practice, propose solutions, and prove the correctness of our approach. We further show that the value functions of learned policies can be used to assign tasks optimally at test time. Experiments show emergent task-aware, multi-step coordination among agents, e.g., pressing a button to unlock a door, holding the door, and short-circuiting tasks.
tldr: The paper introduces Automata-Conditioned Cooperative Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (ACC-MARL) for learning task-conditioned decentralized team policies, proving its correctness and demonstrating emergent task-aware coordination in experiments.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了自动机条件合作多智能体强化学习 (ACC-MARL)，用于学习任务条件下的分散式团队策略，证明了其正确性，并在实验中展示了涌现的任务感知型协作。
summary_zh: 我们研究了在集中式训练、分散式执行下，学习用于协同的时间目标的多任务、多智能体策略问题。在此背景下，使用自动机来表示任务能够将复杂任务分解为更简单的子任务，并分配给智能体。然而，现有方法仍然存在样本效率低下的问题，且仅限于单任务情况。在这项工作中，我们提出了自动机条件合作多智能体强化学习（ACC-MARL），这是一个用于学习任务条件、去中心化团队策略的框架。我们识别了ACC-MARL在实践中可行性的主要挑战，提出了解决方案，并证明了我们方法的正确性。 我们进一步证明了所学策略的价值函数可以用于在测试时优化任务分配。 实验结果表明，智能体之间涌现了具有任务意识的多步协调，例如，按下按钮打开门，保持开门状态，以及任务捷径。

title: Structural Plasticity as Active Inference: A Biologically-Inspired Architecture for Homeostatic Control
summary: Traditional neural networks, while powerful, rely on biologically implausible learning mechanisms such as global backpropagation. This paper introduces the Structurally Adaptive Predictive Inference Network (SAPIN), a novel computational model inspired by the principles of active inference and the morphological plasticity observed in biological neural cultures. SAPIN operates on a 2D grid where processing units, or cells, learn by minimizing local prediction errors. The model features two primary, concurrent learning mechanisms: a local, Hebbian-like synaptic plasticity rule based on the temporal difference between a cell's actual activation and its learned expectation, and a structural plasticity mechanism where cells physically migrate across the grid to optimize their information-receptive fields. This dual approach allows the network to learn both how to process information (synaptic weights) and also where to position its computational resources (network topology). We validated the SAPIN model on the classic Cart Pole reinforcement learning benchmark. Our results demonstrate that the architecture can successfully solve the CartPole task, achieving robust performance. The network's intrinsic drive to minimize prediction error and maintain homeostasis was sufficient to discover a stable balancing policy. We also found that while continual learning led to instability, locking the network's parameters after achieving success resulted in a stable policy. When evaluated for 100 episodes post-locking (repeated over 100 successful agents), the locked networks maintained an average 82% success rate.
tldr: This paper introduces SAPIN, a bio-inspired neural network with structural plasticity and local learning rules, validated on the CartPole reinforcement learning task, showing successful yet unstable learning.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为SAPIN的生物启发神经网络，该网络具有结构可塑性和局部学习规则，并在 CartPole 强化学习任务上进行了验证，结果表明学习成功但存在不稳定性。
summary_zh: 本研究提出了一种结构自适应预测推理网络 (SAPIN)，这是一种受主动推理原理和生物神经培养物中观察到的形态可塑性启发的全新计算模型。 传统的神经网络虽然强大，但依赖于生物学上不太合理的学习机制，例如全局反向传播。SAPIN 在一个 2D 网格上运行，其中的处理单元（或细胞）通过最小化局部预测误差来学习。 该模型具有两个主要的并发学习机制：一种基于单元实际激活与其学习期望之间的时间差的局部、类赫布式的突触可塑性规则，以及一种结构可塑性机制，其中细胞在网格上物理迁移以优化其信息感受野。 这种双重方法使得网络能够学习如何处理信息（突触权重）以及在何处定位其计算资源（网络拓扑）。 我们在经典的倒立摆强化学习基准上验证了 SAPIN 模型。我们的结果表明，该架构可以成功地解决倒立摆任务，并实现稳健的性能。网络最小化预测误差和维持稳态的内在驱动足以发现一种稳定的平衡策略。我们还发现，虽然持续学习会导致不稳定，但在取得成功后锁定网络的参数会导致一个稳定的策略。当对锁定后的 100 个 episode 进行评估（对 100 个成功的代理重复进行）时，锁定的网络保持了平均 82% 的成功率。

title: Continuum: Efficient and Robust Multi-Turn LLM Agent Scheduling with KV Cache Time-to-Live
summary:
KV cache management is essential for efficient LLM inference. To maximize utilization, existing inference engines evict finished requests' KV cache if new requests are waiting. This policy breaks for agentic workloads, which interleave LLM calls with tools, introducing pauses that prevent effective KV reuse across turns. Since some tool calls have much shorter durations than human response multi-turn chatbot, it would be promising to retain the KV cache in during these tools. However, there are many challenges. First, we need to consider both the potential cost of recomputation or reloading (if CPU offloading enabled) and the increasing queueing delays after eviction from GPU. Second, due to the internal variance of tool call durations, we need the method to remain robust under limited predictability of tool call durations.
  We present Continuum, a serving system to optimize job completion time for multi-turn agent workloads by introducing time-to-live mechanism for KV cache retaining. For LLM request that generates a tool call, Continuum selectively pins the KV cache in GPU memory with a time-to-live value determined by considering both the reload cost and ordering preserve benefit of retaining KV cache. Moreover, when the TTL expires, the KV cache can be automatically evicted to free up GPU memory, providing robust performance under edge cases. When combined with program-level first-come-first-serve, Continuum preserves multi-turn continuity, and reduces delay for complex agentic workflows. Our evaluation on real-world agentic workloads (SWE-Bench and BFCL) with Llama-3.1 8B/70B shows that Continuum significantly improves the average job completion times and its improvement scales with turn number increase. We release a preview version at: https://github.com/Hanchenli/vllm-continuum
tldr: The paper introduces Continuum, a system that optimizes job completion time for multi-turn agent workloads by managing the KV cache of LLMs using a time-to-live mechanism, significantly improving performance on real-world agentic tasks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为Continuum的系统，它通过使用生存时间机制管理LLM的KV缓存，从而优化多轮Agent工作负载的作业完成时间，并显著提高实际Agent任务的性能。
summary_zh:
KV缓存管理对于高效的大语言模型推理至关重要。为了最大化利用率，现有的推理引擎会在有新请求等待时，驱逐已完成请求的KV缓存。然而，这种策略在代理工作负载中失效，因为代理工作负载会将大语言模型调用与工具穿插使用，引入暂停，从而阻碍了跨轮次有效的KV重用。由于某些工具调用持续时间远短于人工响应多轮聊天机器人，因此在这些工具调用期间保留KV缓存将是有前景的。然而，存在诸多挑战。首先，我们需要同时考虑重计算或重载（如果启用CPU卸载）的潜在成本，以及从GPU驱逐后增加的排队延迟。其次，由于工具调用持续时间的内部差异，我们需要该方法在工具调用持续时间的可预测性有限的情况下保持稳健性。

我们提出了Continuum，一种服务系统，通过引入KV缓存保留的生存时间机制，优化多轮代理工作负载的作业完成时间。对于生成工具调用的大语言模型请求，Continuum会选择性地将KV缓存在GPU内存中固定，并设置一个生存时间值，该值通过考虑重载成本和保留KV缓存的保序收益来确定。此外，当TTL（生存时间）到期时，KV缓存可以自动驱逐，以释放GPU内存，从而在边缘情况下提供稳健的性能。当与程序级别的先来先服务结合使用时，Continuum可保留多轮连续性，并减少复杂代理工作流程的延迟。我们在真实世界的代理工作负载（SWE-Bench和BFCL）上，使用Llama-3.1 8B/70B进行评估，结果表明Continuum显著提高了平均作业完成时间，并且其改进随轮次数的增加而扩展。我们在以下地址发布了一个预览版本：https://github.com/Hanchenli/vllm-continuum

title: ScenicProver: A Framework for Compositional Probabilistic Verification of Learning-Enabled Systems
summary: Full verification of learning-enabled cyber-physical systems (CPS) has long been intractable due to challenges including black-box components and complex real-world environments. Existing tools either provide formal guarantees for limited types of systems or test the system as a monolith, but no general framework exists for compositional analysis of learning-enabled CPS using varied verification techniques over complex real-world environments. This paper introduces ScenicProver, a verification framework that aims to fill this gap. Built upon the Scenic probabilistic programming language, the framework supports: (1) compositional system description with clear component interfaces, ranging from interpretable code to black boxes; (2) assume-guarantee contracts over those components using an extension of Linear Temporal Logic containing arbitrary Scenic expressions; (3) evidence generation through testing, formal proofs via Lean 4 integration, and importing external assumptions; (4) systematic combination of generated evidence using contract operators; and (5) automatic generation of assurance cases tracking the provenance of system-level guarantees. We demonstrate the framework's effectiveness through a case study on an autonomous vehicle's automatic emergency braking system with sensor fusion. By leveraging manufacturer guarantees for radar and laser sensors and focusing testing efforts on uncertain conditions, our approach enables stronger probabilistic guarantees than monolithic testing with the same computational budget.
tldr: The paper introduces ScenicProver, a framework for compositional probabilistic verification of learning-enabled cyber-physical systems, allowing for varied verification techniques and evidence combination over complex environments. It demonstrates its effectiveness on an autonomous vehicle's braking system.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个名为ScenicProver的框架，用于对学习型网络物理系统进行组合概率验证，允许在复杂的环境中采用不同的验证技术和证据组合。并通过自动驾驶汽车的制动系统演示了其有效性。
summary_zh: 由于黑盒组件和复杂的现实世界环境等挑战，对学习赋能信息物理系统 (CPS) 的完整验证长期以来难以实现。现有的工具要么为有限类型的系统提供形式化保证，要么将系统作为一个整体进行测试，但尚不存在通用框架，以在复杂的现实世界环境中使用不同的验证技术对学习赋能的 CPS 进行组合分析。本文介绍了一种验证框架 ScenicProver，旨在填补这一空白。该框架建立在 Scenic 概率编程语言之上，支持：（1）具有清晰组件接口的组合系统描述，范围从可解释的代码到黑盒；（2）基于这些组件的使用线性时序逻辑的假设-保证契约，该逻辑包含任意 Scenic 表达式；（3）通过测试、通过 Lean 4 集成的形式化证明以及导入外部假设来生成证据；（4）使用契约算子系统地组合生成的证据；以及（5）自动生成跟踪系统级保证来源的保证案例。我们通过一个具有传感器融合的自动驾驶汽车自动紧急制动系统的案例研究证明了该框架的有效性。通过利用制造商对雷达和激光传感器的保证，并将测试工作重点放在不确定条件下，我们的方法能够提供比使用相同计算预算的整体测试更强的概率保证。

title: Can Foundation Models Revolutionize Mobile AR Sparse Sensing?
summary: Mobile sensing systems have long faced a fundamental trade-off between sensing quality and efficiency due to constraints in computation, power, and other limitations. Sparse sensing, which aims to acquire and process only a subset of sensor data, has been a key strategy for maintaining performance under such constraints. However, existing sparse sensing methods often suffer from reduced accuracy, as missing information across space and time introduces uncertainty into many sensing systems. In this work, we investigate whether foundation models can change the landscape of mobile sparse sensing. Using real-world mobile AR data, our evaluations demonstrate that foundation models offer significant improvements in geometry-aware image warping, a central technique for enabling accurate reuse of cross-frame information. Furthermore, our study demonstrates the scalability of foundation model-based sparse sensing and shows its leading performance in 3D scene reconstruction. Collectively, our study reveals critical aspects of the promises and the open challenges of integrating foundation models into mobile sparse sensing systems.
tldr: This paper explores the use of foundation models to enhance sparse sensing in mobile AR, showing improvements in geometry-aware image warping and 3D scene reconstruction, while also highlighting the challenges of this integration.
tldr_zh: 本文探讨了使用基础模型来增强移动AR中的稀疏传感， 展示了几何感知的图像扭曲和3D场景重建方面的改进，同时也强调了这种集成的挑战。
summary_zh: 移动传感系统长期以来面临着传感质量和效率之间的根本权衡，这是由于计算能力、功耗以及其他限制所致。稀疏传感，旨在仅获取和处理传感器数据的一个子集，一直是维持这种约束下性能的关键策略。然而，现有的稀疏传感方法通常会降低精度，因为跨空间和时间的信息缺失会在许多传感系统中引入不确定性。在这项工作中，我们研究了基础模型是否能够改变移动稀疏传感的格局。通过使用真实世界的移动AR数据，我们的评估表明，基础模型在几何感知图像扭曲方面提供了显著的改进，这是一种用于实现跨帧信息精确重用的核心技术。此外，我们的研究证明了基于基础模型的稀疏传感的可扩展性，并展示了其在三维场景重建中的领先性能。总而言之，我们的研究揭示了将基础模型集成到移动稀疏传感系统中的前景以及尚未解决的挑战的关键方面。

title: OmniField: Conditioned Neural Fields for Robust Multimodal Spatiotemporal Learning
summary: Multimodal spatiotemporal learning on real-world experimental data is constrained by two challenges: within-modality measurements are sparse, irregular, and noisy (QA/QC artifacts) but cross-modally correlated; the set of available modalities varies across space and time, shrinking the usable record unless models can adapt to arbitrary subsets at train and test time. We propose OmniField, a continuity-aware framework that learns a continuous neural field conditioned on available modalities and iteratively fuses cross-modal context. A multimodal crosstalk block architecture paired with iterative cross-modal refinement aligns signals prior to the decoder, enabling unified reconstruction, interpolation, forecasting, and cross-modal prediction without gridding or surrogate preprocessing. Extensive evaluations show that OmniField consistently outperforms eight strong multimodal spatiotemporal baselines. Under heavy simulated sensor noise, performance remains close to clean-input levels, highlighting robustness to corrupted measurements.
tldr: The paper introduces OmniField, a neural field framework for robust multimodal spatiotemporal learning that handles sparse, irregular, and noisy data across varying modality availability, demonstrating superior performance in reconstruction, interpolation, forecasting, and cross-modal prediction.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了OmniField，一个用于鲁棒多模态时空学习的神经场框架，它可以处理稀疏、不规则和嘈杂的数据，并应对不同模态可用性的情况。实验表明，该方法在重建、插值、预测和跨模态预测方面表现优异。
summary_zh: 在真实世界实验数据上进行多模态时空学习受到以下两个挑战的限制：模态内部的测量数据是稀疏的、不规则的且带有噪声（质量保证/质量控制伪像），但模态之间存在相关性；可用的模态集合随时间和空间变化，除非模型能够适应训练和测试时任意的子集，否则会缩减可用记录。我们提出了OmniField，一个连续性感知框架，学习一个以可用模态为条件的连续神经场，并迭代地融合跨模态上下文。一个多模态串扰块架构与迭代的跨模态精炼相结合，在解码器之前对齐信号，从而实现统一的重建、插值、预测和跨模态预测，而无需栅格化或代理预处理。大量的评估表明，OmniField始终优于八个强大的多模态时空基线模型。在模拟的严重传感器噪声下，性能仍然接近干净输入时的水平，突出了对受损测量的鲁棒性。

title: Directional-Clamp PPO
summary:
Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) is widely regarded as one of the most successful deep reinforcement learning algorithms, known for its robustness and effectiveness across a range of problems.
  The PPO objective encourages the importance ratio between the current and behavior policies to move to the "right" direction -- starting from importance sampling ratios equal to 1, increasing the ratios for actions with positive advantages and decreasing those with negative advantages. A clipping function is introduced to prevent over-optimization when updating the importance ratio in these "right" direction regions. Many PPO variants have been proposed to extend its success, most of which modify the objective's behavior by altering the clipping in the "right" direction regions. However, due to randomness in the rollouts and stochasticity of the policy optimization, we observe that the ratios frequently move to the "wrong" direction during the PPO optimization. This is a key factor hindering the improvement of PPO, but it has been largely overlooked. To address this, we propose the Directional-Clamp PPO algorithm (DClamp-PPO), which further penalizes the actions going to the strict "wrong" direction regions, where the advantage is positive (negative) and importance ratio falls below (above) $1 - β$ ($1+β$),
  for a tunable parameter $β\in (0, 1)$. The penalty is by enforcing a steeper loss slope, i.e., a clamp, in those regions. We demonstrate that DClamp-PPO consistently outperforms PPO, as well as its variants, by focusing on modifying the objective's behavior in the "right" direction, across various MuJoCo environments, using different random seeds. The proposed method is shown, both theoretically and empirically, to better avoid "wrong" direction updates while keeping the importance ratio closer to 1.
tldr: The paper introduces Directional-Clamp PPO (DClamp-PPO), a modification of PPO that penalizes policy updates in the "wrong" direction, and demonstrates its superior performance on MuJoCo environments.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为方向钳制PPO（DClamp-PPO）的PPO改进算法，该算法惩罚了策略在“错误”方向上的更新，并在MuJoCo环境中展示了其卓越的性能。
summary_zh: 近端策略优化（PPO）被广泛认为是深度强化学习中最成功的算法之一，因其在各种问题上的鲁棒性和有效性而闻名。PPO目标鼓励当前策略与行为策略之间的重要性比率向“正确”方向移动——从等于1的重要性采样比率开始，增加具有正优势的动作的比率，并减少具有负优势的动作的比率。引入一个裁剪函数以防止在这些“正确”方向区域更新重要性比率时过度优化。已经提出了许多PPO变体来扩展其成功，其中大多数通过改变“正确”方向区域中的裁剪来修改目标的行为。然而，由于rollout中的随机性以及策略优化的随机性，我们观察到比率在PPO优化过程中经常向“错误”方向移动。这是阻碍PPO改进的一个关键因素，但它在很大程度上被忽视了。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了定向钳制PPO算法（DClamp-PPO），该算法进一步惩罚了严格朝“错误”方向进行的动作，即优势为正（负）且重要性比率低于（高于）$1 - β$（$1+β$）的区域，其中$β\in (0, 1)$是一个可调参数。惩罚是通过在这些区域中强制执行更陡峭的损失斜率，即进行钳制来实现的。我们通过在不同的MuJoCo环境中使用不同的随机种子，证明了DClamp-PPO始终优于PPO及其变体，因为它专注于修改“正确”方向上目标的行为。理论和实验均表明，所提出的方法可以更好地避免“错误”方向的更新，同时保持重要性比率更接近于1。

title: Reinforcement learning based data assimilation for unknown state model
summary: Data assimilation (DA) has increasingly emerged as a critical tool for state estimation across a wide range of applications. It is significantly challenging when the governing equations of the underlying dynamics are unknown. To this end, various machine learning approaches have been employed to construct a surrogate state transition model in a supervised learning framework, which relies on pre-computed training datasets. However, it is often infeasible to obtain noise-free ground-truth state sequences in practice. To address this challenge, we propose a novel method that integrates reinforcement learning with ensemble-based Bayesian filtering methods, enabling the learning of surrogate state transition model for unknown dynamics directly from noisy observations, without using true state trajectories. Specifically, we treat the process for computing maximum likelihood estimation of surrogate model parameters as a sequential decision-making problem, which can be formulated as a discrete-time Markov decision process (MDP). Under this formulation, learning the surrogate transition model is equivalent to finding an optimal policy of the MDP, which can be effectively addressed using reinforcement learning techniques. Once the model is trained offline, state estimation can be performed in the online stage using filtering methods based on the learned dynamics. The proposed framework accommodates a wide range of observation scenarios, including nonlinear and partially observed measurement models. A few numerical examples demonstrate that the proposed method achieves superior accuracy and robustness in high-dimensional settings.
tldr: This paper proposes a novel reinforcement learning approach for data assimilation to learn surrogate state transition models from noisy observations in systems with unknown dynamics, achieving superior accuracy and robustness.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种新颖的基于强化学习的数据同化方法，用于从具有未知动力学系统的噪声观测中学习代理状态转移模型，实现了卓越的精度和鲁棒性。
summary_zh: 数据同化（DA）已日益成为广泛应用领域中状态估计的关键工具。当潜在动力系统的控制方程未知时，它将面临显著挑战。为此，人们已经采用各种机器学习方法，在监督学习框架中构建代理状态转移模型，这依赖于预先计算的训练数据集。然而，在实践中，获得无噪声的真实状态序列通常是不可行的。为了解决这一挑战，我们提出了一种新方法，该方法将强化学习与基于集合的贝叶斯滤波方法相结合，从而能够直接从含噪声的观测数据中学习未知动力学的代理状态转移模型，而无需使用真实状态轨迹。具体而言，我们将代理模型参数的最大似然估计计算过程视为一个序列决策问题，可以将其表述为一个离散时间马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）。在此表述下，学习代理转移模型等价于找到MDP的最优策略，这可以使用强化学习技术有效地解决。一旦模型离线训练完成，就可以使用基于学习动力学的滤波方法在在线阶段执行状态估计。所提出的框架适用于广泛的观测场景，包括非线性且部分可观测的测量模型。一些数值例子表明，所提出的方法在高维设置中实现了卓越的精度和鲁棒性。

title: Synthetic Crop-Weed Image Generation and its Impact on Model Generalization
summary: Precise semantic segmentation of crops and weeds is necessary for agricultural weeding robots. However, training deep learning models requires large annotated datasets, which are costly to obtain in real fields. Synthetic data can reduce this burden, but the gap between simulated and real images remains a challenge. In this paper, we present a pipeline for procedural generation of synthetic crop-weed images using Blender, producing annotated datasets under diverse conditions of plant growth, weed density, lighting, and camera angle. We benchmark several state-of-the-art segmentation models on synthetic and real datasets and analyze their cross-domain generalization. Our results show that training on synthetic images leads to a sim-to-real gap of 10%, surpassing previous state-of-the-art methods. Moreover, synthetic data demonstrates good generalization properties, outperforming real datasets in cross-domain scenarios. These findings highlight the potential of synthetic agricultural datasets and support hybrid strategies for more efficient model training.
tldr: This paper introduces a Blender-based pipeline for generating synthetic crop-weed images, demonstrating its effectiveness for training semantic segmentation models and improving cross-domain generalization compared to real datasets.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种基于Blender的合成作物杂草图像生成流程，证明了其训练语义分割模型的有效性，并与真实数据集相比，提高了跨域泛化能力。
summary_zh: 作物和杂草的精确语义分割对于农业除草机器人至关重要。然而，训练深度学习模型需要大量带标注的数据集，在真实的田地中获取这些数据集成本高昂。合成数据可以减轻这种负担，但模拟图像和真实图像之间的差距仍然是一个挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用Blender程序化生成合成作物-杂草图像的流程，以在植物生长、杂草密度、光照和相机角度等各种条件下生成带标注的数据集。我们在合成和真实数据集上对几种最先进的分割模型进行了基准测试，并分析了它们的跨域泛化能力。我们的结果表明，使用合成图像进行训练会导致10%的模拟到真实差距，超过了以往最先进的方法。此外，合成数据表现出良好的泛化特性，在跨域场景中优于真实数据集。这些发现突出了合成农业数据集的潜力，并支持用于更高效模型训练的混合策略。

title: Cycle-Sync: Robust Global Camera Pose Estimation through Enhanced Cycle-Consistent Synchronization
summary: We introduce Cycle-Sync, a robust and global framework for estimating camera poses (both rotations and locations). Our core innovation is a location solver that adapts message-passing least squares (MPLS) -- originally developed for group synchronization -- to camera location estimation. We modify MPLS to emphasize cycle-consistent information, redefine cycle consistencies using estimated distances from previous iterations, and incorporate a Welsch-type robust loss. We establish the strongest known deterministic exact-recovery guarantee for camera location estimation, showing that cycle consistency alone -- without access to inter-camera distances -- suffices to achieve the lowest sample complexity currently known. To further enhance robustness, we introduce a plug-and-play outlier rejection module inspired by robust subspace recovery, and we fully integrate cycle consistency into MPLS for rotation synchronization. Our global approach avoids the need for bundle adjustment. Experiments on synthetic and real datasets show that Cycle-Sync consistently outperforms leading pose estimators, including full structure-from-motion pipelines with bundle adjustment.
tldr: Cycle-Sync is a novel framework for robust global camera pose estimation, achieving state-of-the-art performance by enhancing cycle consistency in message-passing least squares.
tldr_zh: Cycle-Sync是一个用于稳健的全局相机姿态估计的新框架，通过增强消息传递最小二乘法中的循环一致性，实现了最先进的性能。
summary_zh: 我们引入了 Cycle-Sync，一个稳健且全局的框架，用于估计相机姿态（包括旋转和平移）。我们的核心创新是一个位置求解器，它将消息传递最小二乘法 (MPLS)——最初为群同步而开发——应用于相机位置估计。我们修改了 MPLS，以强调循环一致性信息，使用来自先前迭代的估计距离重新定义循环一致性，并纳入 Welsch 型稳健损失。 我们为相机位置估计建立了已知的最强的确定性精确恢复保证，表明仅循环一致性——无需访问相机间距离——就足以实现目前已知的最低样本复杂度。为了进一步提高稳健性，我们引入了一个受稳健子空间恢复启发的即插即用型异常值拒绝模块，并将循环一致性完全集成到用于旋转同步的 MPLS 中。我们的全局方法避免了捆绑调整的必要性。在合成和真实数据集上的实验表明，Cycle-Sync 始终优于领先的姿态估计器，包括具有捆绑调整的完整运动结构恢复流程。

title: Optimizing Multi-Lane Intersection Performance in Mixed Autonomy Environments
summary: One of the main challenges in managing traffic at multilane intersections is ensuring smooth coordination between human-driven vehicles (HDVs) and connected autonomous vehicles (CAVs). This paper presents a novel traffic signal control framework that combines Graph Attention Networks (GAT) with Soft Actor-Critic (SAC) reinforcement learning to address this challenge. GATs are used to model the dynamic graph- structured nature of traffic flow to capture spatial and temporal dependencies between lanes and signal phases. The proposed SAC is a robust off-policy reinforcement learning algorithm that enables adaptive signal control through entropy-optimized decision making. This design allows the system to coordinate the signal timing and vehicle movement simultaneously with objectives focused on minimizing travel time, enhancing performance, ensuring safety, and improving fairness between HDVs and CAVs. The model is evaluated using a SUMO-based simulation of a four-way intersection and incorporating different traffic densities and CAV penetration rates. The experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of the GAT-SAC approach by achieving a 24.1% reduction in average delay and up to 29.2% fewer traffic violations compared to traditional methods. Additionally, the fairness ratio between HDVs and CAVs improved to 1.59, indicating more equitable treatment across vehicle types. These findings suggest that the GAT-SAC framework holds significant promise for real-world deployment in mixed-autonomy traffic systems.
tldr: This paper introduces a GAT-SAC reinforcement learning framework for traffic signal control in mixed autonomy environments, demonstrating improvements in traffic flow, safety, and fairness in simulations.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种GAT-SAC强化学习框架，用于混合自主环境下的交通信号控制，仿真结果表明，该框架在交通流量、安全性和公平性方面均有所改善。
summary_zh: 管理多车道交叉口交通的主要挑战之一是确保人工驾驶车辆（HDV）和联网自动驾驶车辆（CAV）之间的顺畅协调。本文提出了一种新的交通信号控制框架，该框架结合了图注意力网络（GAT）和软演员-评论员（SAC）强化学习来应对这一挑战。GAT用于建模交通流的动态图结构性质，以捕获车道和信号相位之间的空间和时间依赖性。所提出的SAC是一种稳健的离线策略强化学习算法，通过熵优化的决策来实现自适应信号控制。这种设计使得系统能够同时协调信号配时和车辆移动，目标集中在最小化行程时间、提高性能、确保安全以及改善HDV和CAV之间的公平性。该模型通过基于SUMO的四路交叉口仿真进行评估，并纳入了不同的交通密度和CAV渗透率。实验结果表明，GAT-SAC方法的有效性体现在与传统方法相比，平均延误减少了24.1%，交通违规行为减少了高达29.2%。此外，HDV和CAV之间的公平性比率提高到1.59，表明对不同类型车辆的待遇更加公平。这些发现表明，GAT-SAC框架在混合自动驾驶交通系统中的实际部署方面具有显著前景。

title: Adaptive Cooperative Transmission Design for Ultra-Reliable Low-Latency Communications via Deep Reinforcement Learning
summary: Next-generation wireless communication systems must support ultra-reliable low-latency communication (URLLC) service for mission-critical applications. Meeting stringent URLLC requirements is challenging, especially for two-hop cooperative communication. In this paper, we develop an adaptive transmission design for a two-hop relaying communication system. Each hop transmission adaptively configures its transmission parameters separately, including numerology, mini-slot size, and modulation and coding scheme, for reliable packet transmission within a strict latency constraint. We formulate the hop-specific transceiver configuration as a Markov decision process (MDP) and propose a dual-agent reinforcement learning-based cooperative latency-aware transmission (DRL-CoLA) algorithm to learn latency-aware transmission policies in a distributed manner. Simulation results verify that the proposed algorithm achieves the near-optimal reliability while satisfying strict latency requirements.
tldr: This paper proposes a deep reinforcement learning (DRL) based adaptive transmission design (DRL-CoLA) for ultra-reliable low-latency communication (URLLC) in two-hop cooperative communication systems by optimizing hop-specific transmission parameters.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于深度强化学习（DRL）的自适应传输设计（DRL-CoLA），用于双跳协作通信系统中的超可靠低延迟通信（URLLC），通过优化特定跳的传输参数。
summary_zh: 下一代无线通信系统必须支持用于关键任务应用的超可靠低延迟通信(URLLC)服务。 满足严格的URLLC要求极具挑战性，特别是对于双跳协作通信而言。 在本文中，我们为双跳中继通信系统开发了一种自适应传输设计。 每个跳跃的传输自适应地配置其单独的传输参数，包括数理参数、迷你时隙大小、以及调制和编码方案，以在严格的延迟约束内实现可靠的数据包传输。 我们将特定跳跃的收发器配置建模为马尔可夫决策过程(MDP)，并提出了一种基于双代理强化学习的协作延迟感知传输(DRL-CoLA)算法，以分布式方式学习延迟感知的传输策略。 仿真结果验证了所提出的算法在满足严格延迟要求的同时，实现了接近最优的可靠性。

title: Object Detection as an Optional Basis: A Graph Matching Network for Cross-View UAV Localization
summary: With the rapid growth of the low-altitude economy, UAVs have become crucial for measurement and tracking in patrol systems. However, in GNSS-denied areas, satellite-based localization methods are prone to failure. This paper presents a cross-view UAV localization framework that performs map matching via object detection, aimed at effectively addressing cross-temporal, cross-view, heterogeneous aerial image matching. In typical pipelines, UAV visual localization is formulated as an image-retrieval problem: features are extracted to build a localization map, and the pose of a query image is estimated by matching it to a reference database with known poses. Because publicly available UAV localization datasets are limited, many approaches recast localization as a classification task and rely on scene labels in these datasets to ensure accuracy. Other methods seek to reduce cross-domain differences using polar-coordinate reprojection, perspective transformations, or generative adversarial networks; however, they can suffer from misalignment, content loss, and limited realism. In contrast, we leverage modern object detection to accurately extract salient instances from UAV and satellite images, and integrate a graph neural network to reason about inter-image and intra-image node relationships. Using a fine-grained, graph-based node-similarity metric, our method achieves strong retrieval and localization performance. Extensive experiments on public and real-world datasets show that our approach handles heterogeneous appearance differences effectively and generalizes well, making it applicable to scenarios with larger modality gaps, such as infrared-visible image matching. Our dataset will be publicly available at the following URL: https://github.com/liutao23/ODGNNLoc.git.
tldr: The paper introduces a cross-view UAV localization framework using object detection and graph neural networks for robust and accurate localization in GNSS-denied environments, even with heterogeneous imagery.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种利用目标检测和图神经网络的跨视角无人机定位框架，即使在异构图像环境中，也能在无全球导航卫星系统（GNSS）环境下实现鲁棒且精确的定位。
summary_zh: 随着低空经济的快速发展，无人机已成为巡检系统中测量和跟踪的关键工具。然而，在GNSS拒止区域，基于卫星的定位方法容易失效。本文提出了一种基于跨视角无人机定位框架，该框架通过目标检测执行地图匹配，旨在有效解决跨时间、跨视角、异构的航拍图像匹配问题。在典型的流程中，无人机视觉定位被形式化为图像检索问题：提取特征以构建定位地图，并通过将查询图像与具有已知姿态的参考数据库进行匹配来估计查询图像的姿态。由于公开可用的无人机定位数据集有限，许多方法将定位重新定义为分类任务，并依赖于这些数据集中的场景标签来确保准确性。其他方法试图使用极坐标重投影、透视变换或生成对抗网络来减少跨域差异；然而，它们可能会遭受对齐偏差、内容丢失和真实感有限的影响。相比之下，我们利用现代目标检测技术，从无人机和卫星图像中准确提取显著实例，并集成图神经网络来推理图像间和图像内节点关系。借助细粒度的、基于图的节点相似性度量，我们的方法实现了强大的检索和定位性能。在公共数据集和真实世界数据集上的大量实验表明，我们的方法能够有效地处理异构外观差异并具有良好的泛化能力，使其适用于具有更大模态差异（例如红外-可见光图像匹配）的场景。我们的数据集将在以下URL公开：https://github.com/liutao23/ODGNNLoc.git。

title: 3D Point Cloud Object Detection on Edge Devices for Split Computing
summary: The field of autonomous driving technology is rapidly advancing, with deep learning being a key component. Particularly in the field of sensing, 3D point cloud data collected by LiDAR is utilized to run deep neural network models for 3D object detection. However, these state-of-the-art models are complex, leading to longer processing times and increased power consumption on edge devices. The objective of this study is to address these issues by leveraging Split Computing, a distributed machine learning inference method. Split Computing aims to lessen the computational burden on edge devices, thereby reducing processing time and power consumption. Furthermore, it minimizes the risk of data breaches by only transmitting intermediate data from the deep neural network model. Experimental results show that splitting after voxelization reduces the inference time by 70.8% and the edge device execution time by 90.0%. When splitting within the network, the inference time is reduced by up to 57.1%, and the edge device execution time is reduced by up to 69.5%.
tldr: This paper explores using Split Computing to reduce the computational burden of 3D point cloud object detection models on edge devices, achieving significant reductions in inference and execution time.
tldr_zh: 本文探讨了使用Split Computing来减轻边缘设备上3D点云目标检测模型的计算负担，从而显著减少了推理和执行时间。
summary_zh: 自动驾驶技术领域正快速发展，深度学习是其中的关键组成部分。特别是在感知领域，激光雷达采集的3D点云数据被用于运行深度神经网络模型，以实现3D物体检测。然而，这些最先进的模型非常复杂，导致边缘设备上的处理时间和功耗增加。本研究旨在通过利用分裂计算（一种分布式机器学习推理方法）来解决这些问题。分裂计算旨在减轻边缘设备的计算负担，从而减少处理时间和功耗。此外，它通过仅传输来自深度神经网络模型的中间数据，最大限度地降低了数据泄露的风险。实验结果表明，在体素化后进行分裂可将推理时间减少70.8%，边缘设备执行时间减少90.0%。在网络内部进行分裂时，推理时间最多可减少57.1%，边缘设备执行时间最多可减少69.5%。

title: Compressing Multi-Task Model for Autonomous Driving via Pruning and Knowledge Distillation
summary: Autonomous driving systems rely on panoptic perception to jointly handle object detection, drivable area segmentation, and lane line segmentation. Although multi-task learning is an effective way to integrate these tasks, its increasing model parameters and complexity make deployment on on-board devices difficult. To address this challenge, we propose a multi-task model compression framework that combines task-aware safe pruning with feature-level knowledge distillation. Our safe pruning strategy integrates Taylor-based channel importance with gradient conflict penalty to keep important channels while removing redundant and conflicting channels. To mitigate performance degradation after pruning, we further design a task head-agnostic distillation method that transfers intermediate backbone and encoder features from a teacher to a student model as guidance. Experiments on the BDD100K dataset demonstrate that our compressed model achieves a 32.7% reduction in parameters while segmentation performance shows negligible accuracy loss and only a minor decrease in detection (-1.2% for Recall and -1.8% for mAP50) compared to the teacher. The compressed model still runs at 32.7 FPS in real-time. These results show that combining pruning and knowledge distillation provides an effective compression solution for multi-task panoptic perception.
tldr: This paper presents a pruning and knowledge distillation framework to compress multi-task models for autonomous driving, achieving significant parameter reduction with minimal performance loss on the BDD100K dataset.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种剪枝和知识蒸馏框架，用于压缩自动驾驶的多任务模型，在 BDD100K 数据集上实现了显著的参数减少且性能损失最小。
summary_zh: 自动驾驶系统依赖于全景感知来联合处理目标检测、可行驶区域分割和车道线分割。虽然多任务学习是集成这些任务的有效方法，但其不断增加的模型参数和复杂性使得在车载设备上的部署变得困难。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种多任务模型压缩框架，该框架结合了任务感知的安全剪枝与特征级知识蒸馏。我们的安全剪枝策略将基于泰勒展开的通道重要性与梯度冲突惩罚相结合，以保留重要通道，同时移除冗余和冲突通道。为了减轻剪枝后的性能下降，我们进一步设计了一种任务头不可知的蒸馏方法，该方法将教师模型的中层骨干网络和编码器特征转移到学生模型，作为引导。在BDD100K数据集上的实验表明，我们的压缩模型参数量减少了32.7%，同时分割性能表现出可忽略的精度损失，检测性能仅略有下降（Recall下降-1.2%，mAP50下降-1.8%），与教师模型相比。压缩后的模型仍然可以实时运行，帧率为32.7 FPS。这些结果表明，结合剪枝和知识蒸馏为多任务全景感知提供了一种有效的压缩解决方案。

title: RL-Aided Cognitive ISAC: Robust Detection and Sensing-Communication Trade-offs
summary: This paper proposes a reinforcement learning (RL)-aided cognitive framework for massive MIMO-based integrated sensing and communication (ISAC) systems employing a uniform planar array (UPA). The focus is on enhancing radar sensing performance in environments with unknown and dynamic disturbance characteristics. A Wald-type detector is employed for robust target detection under non-Gaussian clutter, while a SARSA-based RL algorithm enables adaptive estimation of target positions without prior environmental knowledge. Based on the RL-derived sensing information, a joint waveform optimization strategy is formulated to balance radar sensing accuracy and downlink communication throughput. The resulting design provides an adaptive trade-off between detection performance and achievable sum rate through an analytically derived closed-form solution. Monte Carlo simulations demonstrate that the proposed cognitive ISAC framework achieves significantly improved detection probability compared to orthogonal and non-learning adaptive baselines, while maintaining competitive communication performance. These results underline the potential of RL-assisted sensing for robust and spectrum-efficient ISAC in next-generation wireless networks.
tldr: This paper proposes a reinforcement learning-aided cognitive framework for integrated sensing and communication (ISAC) systems, achieving a trade-off between radar sensing and communication throughput in dynamic environments. It demonstrates improved detection probability and competitive communication performance.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于强化学习的认知框架，用于集成感知与通信 (ISAC) 系统，在动态环境中实现了雷达感知和通信吞吐量之间的权衡。 结果表明，检测概率有所提高，通信性能具有竞争力。
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种基于强化学习(RL)的认知框架，用于采用均匀平面阵列(UPA)的大规模MIMO集成感知与通信(ISAC)系统。重点在于增强具有未知和动态干扰特征环境下的雷达感知性能。采用Wald型检测器，用于非高斯杂波下的鲁棒目标检测，而基于SARSA的强化学习算法可以在没有先验环境知识的情况下自适应地估计目标位置。基于RL导出的感知信息，制定了一种联合波形优化策略，以平衡雷达感知精度和下行链路通信吞吐量。由此产生的设计通过分析推导出的闭式解，在检测性能和可实现的总速率之间提供了一种自适应权衡。蒙特卡罗仿真表明，与正交和非学习自适应基线相比，所提出的认知ISAC框架实现了显著提高的检测概率，同时保持了具有竞争力的通信性能。这些结果强调了RL辅助感知在下一代无线网络中实现鲁棒和频谱高效的ISAC的潜力。

title: Leveraging Foundation Models for Calibration-Free c-VEP BCIs
summary: Foundation Models (FMs) have surged in popularity over the past five years, with applications spanning fields from computer vision to natural language processing. Brain-Computer Interfaces (BCIs) have also gained momentum due to their potential to support individuals with complex disabilities. Among BCI paradigms, code-modulated Visual Evoked Potentials (c-VEPs) remain relatively understudied, despite offering high information transfer rates and large selection target capacities. However, c-VEP systems require lengthy calibration sessions, limiting their practicality outside of laboratory settings. In this study, we use a FM for the first time to eliminate the need for lengthy calibration in c-VEP BCI systems. We evaluated two approaches: (1) a truly calibration-free approach requiring no subject-specific data, and (2) a limited calibration approach, where we assessed the benefit of incorporating incremental amounts of calibration data. In both cases, a classification head is trained on data from other subjects. For a new subject, no calibration data is required in the calibration-free setup, making the c-VEP system effectively plug-and-play. The proposed method was tested on two c-VEP datasets. For the calibration-free approach, the average accuracy on the first dataset (n = 17) was 68.8% +/- 17.6%, comparable to the full-calibration performance reported in the original study (66.2% +/- 13.8%), which required approximately 11 minutes of calibration. On the second dataset (n = 12), the calibration-free accuracy was 71.8% +/- 20.2%, versus 93.7% +/- 5.5% from the original study, which required around 3.5 minutes. A limited-calibration approach using only 20% of the subject's data (approximately 43 seconds) yielded 92% +/- 5.2% accuracy. These results indicate that our FM-based approach can effectively eliminate or significantly reduce the need for lengthy calibration in c-VEP BCIs.
tldr: This paper explores using Foundation Models to reduce or eliminate the lengthy calibration process in code-modulated Visual Evoked Potential (c-VEP) Brain-Computer Interfaces (BCIs), achieving comparable or improved accuracy with significantly less calibration data.
tldr_zh: 本文探索了使用基础模型来减少或消除代码调制视觉诱发电位 (c-VEP) 脑机接口 (BCI) 中漫长的校准过程，并以显着减少的校准数据实现了可比甚至更高的准确度。
summary_zh: 基础模型（FMs）在过去五年中迅速普及，其应用涵盖从计算机视觉到自然语言处理等领域。脑机接口（BCIs）也因其支持复杂残疾人士的潜力而备受关注。在脑机接口范式中，编码调制视觉诱发电位（c-VEPs）尽管具有高信息传输速率和大的选择目标容量，但仍相对缺乏研究。然而，c-VEP系统需要漫长的校准过程，限制了其在实验室环境之外的实用性。在本研究中，我们首次使用基础模型来消除c-VEP脑机接口系统中对漫长校准过程的需求。我们评估了两种方法：（1）一种真正免校准的方法，不需要任何被试特定数据；（2）一种有限校准的方法，其中我们评估了纳入增量校准数据的好处。在这两种情况下，分类头都在来自其他被试的数据上进行训练。对于新的被试，在免校准设置中不需要校准数据，从而使c-VEP系统实现即插即用。所提出的方法在两个c-VEP数据集上进行了测试。对于免校准方法，在第一个数据集（n = 17）上的平均准确率为68.8% +/- 17.6%，与原始研究中报告的完全校准性能（66.2% +/- 13.8%）相当，后者需要大约11分钟的校准。在第二个数据集（n = 12）上，免校准准确度为71.8% +/- 20.2%，而原始研究的准确度为93.7% +/- 5.5%，后者需要大约3.5分钟。仅使用被试20%的数据（约43秒）的有限校准方法产生了92% +/- 5.2%的准确率。这些结果表明，我们基于基础模型的方法可以有效地消除或显著减少c-VEP脑机接口中对漫长校准过程的需求。

title: Non-Contact Manipulation of Induced Magnetic Dipoles
summary: Extending the field of magnetic manipulation to conductive, non-magnetic objects opens the door for a wide array of applications previously limited to hard or soft magnetic materials. Of particular interest is the recycling of space debris through the use of oscillating magnetic fields, which represent a cache of raw materials in an environment particularly suited to the low forces generated from inductive magnetic manipulation. Building upon previous work that demonstrated 3D open-loop position control by leveraging the opposing dipole moment created from induced eddy currents, this work demonstrates closed-loop position control of a semi-buoyant aluminum sphere in lab tests, and the efficacy of varying methods for force inversion is explored. The closed-loop methods represent a critical first step towards wider applications for 3-DOF position control of induced magnetic dipoles.
tldr: This paper demonstrates closed-loop position control of an aluminum sphere using induced magnetic dipoles, a step towards non-contact manipulation with potential applications in space debris recycling.
tldr_zh: 本文展示了使用感应磁偶极子对铝球进行闭环位置控制，这是非接触式操作的重要一步，在空间碎片回收方面具有潜在应用。
summary_zh: 将磁操控领域扩展到导电、非磁性物体，为先前仅限于硬磁或软磁材料的广泛应用打开了大门。特别值得关注的是利用振荡磁场回收太空碎片，它们代表着原始材料的巨大储备，并且太空环境特别适合感应磁操控产生的低作用力。在先前工作的基础上，该工作通过利用感应涡流产生的反向偶极矩，实现了三维开环位置控制，本研究进一步展示了在实验室测试中对半漂浮铝球的闭环位置控制，并探讨了各种力反演方法的有效性。这些闭环方法代表着在三自由度感应磁偶极子位置控制领域，向更广泛应用迈出的关键第一步。

title: Kinematic and Ergonomic Design of a Robotic Arm for Precision Laparoscopic Surgery
summary: Robotic assistance in minimally invasive surgery can greatly enhance surgical precision and reduce surgeon fatigue. This paper presents a focused investigation on the kinematic and ergonomic design principles for a laparoscopic surgical robotic arm aimed at high-precision tasks. We propose a 7-degree-of-freedom (7-DOF) robotic arm system that incorporates a remote center of motion (RCM) at the instrument insertion point and ergonomic considerations to improve surgeon interaction. The design is implemented on a general-purpose robotic platform, and a series of simulated surgical tasks were performed to evaluate targeting accuracy, task efficiency, and surgeon comfort compared to conventional manual laparoscopy. Experimental results demonstrate that the optimized robotic design achieves significantly improved targeting accuracy (error reduced by over 50%) and shorter task completion times, while substantially lowering operator muscle strain and discomfort. These findings validate the importance of kinematic optimization (such as added articulations and tremor filtering) and human-centered ergonomic design in enhancing the performance of robot-assisted surgery. The insights from this work can guide the development of next-generation surgical robots that improve surgical outcomes and ergonomics for the operating team.
tldr: This paper presents a 7-DOF robotic arm for laparoscopic surgery, demonstrating improved accuracy, efficiency, and ergonomics compared to manual methods using kinematic optimization and ergonomic design. The design is evaluated via simulated surgical tasks.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种用于腹腔镜手术的7自由度机械臂， 通过运动学优化和人体工程学设计，证明与手动方法相比，该机械臂在精度、效率和人体工程学方面都有所提高。该设计通过模拟手术任务进行了评估。
summary_zh: 微创手术中的机器人辅助可以显著提高手术精度并减轻外科医生的疲劳。本文重点研究了旨在实现高精度操作的腹腔镜手术机器人手臂的运动学和人机工程学设计原则。我们提出了一种7自由度(7-DOF)的机器人手臂系统，该系统在器械插入点处集成了一个遥操作中心(RCM)，并考虑了人机工程学因素以改善外科医生的交互。该设计在通用机器人平台上实现，并进行了一系列模拟手术任务，以评估与传统手动腹腔镜手术相比的靶向精度、任务效率和外科医生舒适度。实验结果表明，优化后的机器人设计显著提高了靶向精度（误差降低超过50%），缩短了任务完成时间，同时大幅降低了操作者的肌肉劳损和不适感。这些发现验证了运动学优化（例如增加的关节和颤振滤波）和以人为本的人机工程学设计在提高机器人辅助手术性能方面的重要性。这项工作的见解可以指导下一代手术机器人的开发，从而改善手术效果和手术团队的人机工程学。

title: TurboMap: GPU-Accelerated Local Mapping for Visual SLAM
summary: This paper presents TurboMap, a GPU-accelerated and CPU-optimized local mapping module for visual SLAM systems. We identify key performance bottlenecks in the local mapping process for visual SLAM and address them through targeted GPU and CPU optimizations. Specifically, we offload map point triangulation and fusion to the GPU, accelerate redundant keyframe culling on the CPU, and integrate a GPU-accelerated solver to speed up local bundle adjustment. Our implementation is built on top of ORB-SLAM3 and leverages CUDA for GPU programming. The experimental results show that TurboMap achieves an average speedup of 1.3x in the EuRoC dataset and 1.6x in the TUM-VI dataset in the local mapping module, on both desktop and embedded platforms, while maintaining the accuracy of the original system.
tldr: TurboMap accelerates the local mapping module in ORB-SLAM3 using GPU optimizations, achieving 1.3-1.6x speedup on standard visual SLAM datasets without sacrificing accuracy.
tldr_zh: TurboMap通过GPU优化加速ORB-SLAM3中的局部地图构建模块，在标准视觉SLAM数据集上实现了1.3-1.6倍的加速，同时保持了准确性。
summary_zh: 本文提出TurboMap，一个针对视觉SLAM系统，经过GPU加速和CPU优化的局部地图构建模块。我们识别出视觉SLAM局部地图构建过程中的关键性能瓶颈，并通过有针对性的GPU和CPU优化来解决这些问题。具体来说，我们将地图点三角化和融合卸载到GPU，加速CPU上的冗余关键帧剔除，并集成一个GPU加速的求解器来加速局部集束调整。我们的实现构建在ORB-SLAM3之上，并利用CUDA进行GPU编程。实验结果表明，在桌面和嵌入式平台上，TurboMap在EuRoC数据集上局部地图构建模块的平均速度提升了1.3倍，在TUM-VI数据集上提升了1.6倍，同时保持了原始系统的精度。

title: An End-to-End Learning Approach for Solving Capacitated Location-Routing Problems
summary: The capacitated location-routing problems (CLRPs) are classical problems in combinatorial optimization, which require simultaneously making location and routing decisions. In CLRPs, the complex constraints and the intricate relationships between various decisions make the problem challenging to solve. With the emergence of deep reinforcement learning (DRL), it has been extensively applied to address the vehicle routing problem and its variants, while the research related to CLRPs still needs to be explored. In this paper, we propose the DRL with heterogeneous query (DRLHQ) to solve CLRP and open CLRP (OCLRP), respectively. We are the first to propose an end-to-end learning approach for CLRPs, following the encoder-decoder structure. In particular, we reformulate the CLRPs as a markov decision process tailored to various decisions, a general modeling framework that can be adapted to other DRL-based methods. To better handle the interdependency across location and routing decisions, we also introduce a novel heterogeneous querying attention mechanism designed to adapt dynamically to various decision-making stages. Experimental results on both synthetic and benchmark datasets demonstrate superior solution quality and better generalization performance of our proposed approach over representative traditional and DRL-based baselines in solving both CLRP and OCLRP.
tldr: This paper introduces a novel DRL approach (DRLHQ) with a heterogeneous querying attention mechanism for solving Capacitated Location-Routing Problems (CLRPs) and Open CLRPs, claiming superior performance and generalization over existing methods.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种新的DRL方法 (DRLHQ)，具有异构查询注意力机制，用于解决有容量限制的选址-路径问题 (CLRPs) 和开放 CLRP (OCLRP)。该方法声称在性能和泛化能力方面优于现有方法。
summary_zh: 有容量限制的选址-路径问题（CLRPs）是组合优化中的经典问题，它需要同时做出选址和路径选择决策。在CLRPs中，复杂的约束条件以及各种决策之间错综复杂的关系使得该问题极具挑战性。随着深度强化学习（DRL）的出现，它已被广泛应用于解决车辆路径问题及其变体，而与CLRPs相关的研究仍有待探索。在本文中，我们提出了具有异构查询的DRL（DRLHQ），分别用于求解CLRP和开放式CLRP（OCLRP）。我们是第一个提出CLRPs端到端学习方法的，其遵循编码器-解码器结构。特别地，我们将CLRPs重新定义为面向各种决策的马尔可夫决策过程，这是一个通用的建模框架，可以适用于其他基于DRL的方法。为了更好地处理选址和路径决策之间的相互依赖性，我们还引入了一种新颖的异构查询注意力机制，旨在动态适应各种决策阶段。在合成数据集和基准数据集上的实验结果表明，与具有代表性的传统和基于DRL的基线方法相比，我们提出的方法在求解CLRP和OCLRP时具有卓越的求解质量和更好的泛化性。

title: Efficient Online Continual Learning in Sensor-Based Human Activity Recognition
summary: Machine learning models for sensor-based human activity recognition (HAR) are expected to adapt post-deployment to recognize new activities and different ways of performing existing ones. To address this need, Online Continual Learning (OCL) mechanisms have been proposed, allowing models to update their knowledge incrementally as new data become available while preserving previously acquired information. However, existing OCL approaches for sensor-based HAR are computationally intensive and require extensive labeled samples to represent new changes. Recently, pre-trained model-based (PTM-based) OCL approaches have shown significant improvements in performance and efficiency for computer vision applications. These methods achieve strong generalization capabilities by pre-training complex models on large datasets, followed by fine-tuning on downstream tasks for continual learning. However, applying PTM-based OCL approaches to sensor-based HAR poses significant challenges due to the inherent heterogeneity of HAR datasets and the scarcity of labeled data in post-deployment scenarios. This paper introduces PTRN-HAR, the first successful application of PTM-based OCL to sensor-based HAR. Unlike prior PTM-based OCL approaches, PTRN-HAR pre-trains the feature extractor using contrastive loss with a limited amount of data. This extractor is then frozen during the streaming stage. Furthermore, it replaces the conventional dense classification layer with a relation module network. Our design not only significantly reduces the resource consumption required for model training while maintaining high performance, but also improves data efficiency by reducing the amount of labeled data needed for effective continual learning, as demonstrated through experiments on three public datasets, outperforming the state-of-the-art. The code can be found here: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/PTRN-HAR-AF60/
tldr: The paper introduces PTRN-HAR, a pre-trained model-based online continual learning approach for sensor-based human activity recognition that addresses computational intensity and data scarcity issues by using contrastive learning for feature extractor pre-training and a relation module network for classification. It claims SOTA performance.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了PTRN-HAR，一种基于预训练模型的在线持续学习方法，用于基于传感器的行为识别。该方法通过使用对比学习进行特征提取器预训练和关系模块网络进行分类，解决了计算强度和数据稀缺的问题。论文声称达到了SOTA性能。
summary_zh: 基于传感器的人类活动识别(HAR)的机器学习模型需要具备部署后适应性，能够识别新的活动以及执行现有活动的不同方式。为了满足这一需求，研究人员提出了在线持续学习(OCL)机制，使得模型能够在获取新数据时以增量方式更新知识，同时保留先前习得的信息。然而，现有的基于传感器的HAR的OCL方法计算密集，并且需要大量的标记样本来表示新的变化。最近，基于预训练模型(PTM-based)的OCL方法在计算机视觉应用中表现出显著的性能和效率提升。这些方法通过在大数据集上预训练复杂模型，然后在下游任务上进行微调以进行持续学习，从而实现强大的泛化能力。然而，由于HAR数据集固有的异构性以及部署后场景中标记数据的稀缺性，将基于PTM的OCL方法应用于基于传感器的HAR面临着巨大的挑战。本文介绍了PTRN-HAR，这是基于PTM的OCL在基于传感器的HAR中的首次成功应用。与之前的基于PTM的OCL方法不同，PTRN-HAR使用对比损失函数以有限的数据来预训练特征提取器。该提取器在流式处理阶段会被冻结。此外，它用关系模块网络代替了传统的密集分类层。我们的设计不仅显著降低了模型训练所需的资源消耗，同时保持了高性能，而且还通过减少有效持续学习所需的标记数据量，提高了数据效率，这已通过对三个公共数据集的实验证明，其性能优于当前最先进水平。代码可在以下位置找到：https://anonymous.4open.science/r/PTRN-HAR-AF60/

title: Diversified Flow Matching with Translation Identifiability
summary: Diversified distribution matching (DDM) finds a unified translation function mapping a diverse collection of conditional source distributions to their target counterparts. DDM was proposed to resolve content misalignment issues in unpaired domain translation, achieving translation identifiability. However, DDM has only been implemented using GANs due to its constraints on the translation function. GANs are often unstable to train and do not provide the transport trajectory information -- yet such trajectories are useful in applications such as single-cell evolution analysis and robot route planning. This work introduces diversified flow matching (DFM), an ODE-based framework for DDM. Adapting flow matching (FM) to enforce a unified translation function as in DDM is challenging, as FM learns the translation function's velocity rather than the translation function itself. A custom bilevel optimization-based training loss, a nonlinear interpolant, and a structural reformulation are proposed to address these challenges, offering a tangible implementation. To our knowledge, DFM is the first ODE-based approach guaranteeing translation identifiability. Experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets validate the proposed method.
tldr: This paper introduces Diversified Flow Matching (DFM), an ODE-based method for diversified distribution matching that guarantees translation identifiability, addressing limitations of GAN-based approaches.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了多样化流匹配（DFM），一种基于ODE的多样化分布匹配方法，保证了翻译可识别性，解决了基于GAN的方法的局限性。
summary_zh: 多样化分布匹配（DDM）旨在寻找一个统一的翻译函数，该函数能够将各种条件源分布映射到其目标对应项。DDM的提出是为了解决非配对域翻译中的内容未对齐问题，从而实现翻译可识别性。然而，由于其对翻译函数的约束，DDM仅能通过GAN实现。GAN的训练通常不稳定，并且无法提供传输轨迹信息——而这些轨迹在诸如单细胞进化分析和机器人路径规划等应用中非常有用。本文介绍了一种基于ODE的DDM框架，即多样化流匹配（DFM）。要像DDM中那样，使流匹配（FM）强制执行一个统一的翻译函数是具有挑战性的，因为FM学习的是翻译函数的速度，而不是翻译函数本身。本文提出了一种定制的双层优化训练损失、一种非线性插值器以及一种结构重构，以应对这些挑战，并提供了一个切实的实现方案。据我们所知，DFM是第一个保证翻译可识别性的基于ODE的方法。在合成数据集和真实数据集上的实验验证了所提出的方法。

title: Machine and Deep Learning for Indoor UWB Jammer Localization
summary: Ultra-wideband (UWB) localization delivers centimeter-scale accuracy but is vulnerable to jamming attacks, creating security risks for asset tracking and intrusion detection in smart buildings. Although machine learning (ML) and deep learning (DL) methods have improved tag localization, localizing malicious jammers within a single room and across changing indoor layouts remains largely unexplored. Two novel UWB datasets, collected under original and modified room configurations, are introduced to establish comprehensive ML/DL baselines. Performance is rigorously evaluated using a variety of classification and regression metrics. On the source dataset with the collected UWB features, Random Forest achieves the highest F1-macro score of 0.95 and XGBoost achieves the lowest mean Euclidean error of 20.16 cm. However, deploying these source-trained models in the modified room layout led to severe performance degradation, with XGBoost's mean Euclidean error increasing tenfold to 207.99 cm, demonstrating significant domain shift. To mitigate this degradation, a domain-adversarial ConvNeXt autoencoder (A-CNT) is proposed that leverages a gradient-reversal layer to align CIR-derived features across domains. The A-CNT framework restores localization performance by reducing the mean Euclidean error to 34.67 cm. This represents a 77 percent improvement over non-adversarial transfer learning and an 83 percent improvement over the best baseline, restoring the fraction of samples within 30 cm to 0.56. Overall, the results demonstrate that adversarial feature alignment enables robust and transferable indoor jammer localization despite environmental changes. Code and dataset available at https://github.com/afbf4c8996f/Jammer-Loc
tldr: This paper introduces a novel UWB dataset and a domain-adversarial ConvNeXt autoencoder (A-CNT) to address the problem of indoor UWB jammer localization in changing room layouts, demonstrating improved robustness compared to baseline models.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个新的UWB数据集和一个域对抗ConvNeXt自编码器 (A-CNT)，用于解决室内UWB干扰器在变化的房间布局中的定位问题，展示了相比基线模型显著的鲁棒性提升。
summary_zh: 超宽带(UWB)定位能够提供厘米级的精度，但容易受到干扰攻击，对智能建筑中的资产跟踪和入侵检测造成安全风险。尽管机器学习(ML)和深度学习(DL)方法提高了标签定位的性能，但在单个房间内和不断变化的室内布局中定位恶意干扰源仍然未被充分探索。为了建立全面的ML/DL基线，本文引入了两个新颖的UWB数据集，这些数据集是在原始和修改后的房间配置下收集的。使用各种分类和回归指标对性能进行严格评估。在具有收集到的UWB特征的源数据集上，随机森林实现了最高的F1-macro分数0.95，而XGBoost实现了最低的平均欧几里得误差20.16厘米。然而，将这些源训练的模型部署在修改后的房间布局中会导致严重的性能下降，其中XGBoost的平均欧几里得误差增加了十倍，达到207.99厘米，表明存在显著的领域转移。为了缓解这种下降，本文提出了一种域对抗ConvNeXt自编码器(A-CNT)，它利用梯度反转层来对齐跨域的信道脉冲响应(CIR)导出特征。A-CNT框架通过将平均欧几里得误差降低到34.67厘米来恢复定位性能。这比非对抗性迁移学习提高了77%，比最佳基线提高了83%，将30厘米范围内的样本比例恢复到0.56。总而言之，结果表明，尽管环境发生变化，对抗性特征对齐能够实现鲁棒且可转移的室内干扰源定位。代码和数据集可在https://github.com/afbf4c8996f/Jammer-Loc找到。

title: MVAFormer: RGB-based Multi-View Spatio-Temporal Action Recognition with Transformer
summary: Multi-view action recognition aims to recognize human actions using multiple camera views and deals with occlusion caused by obstacles or crowds. In this task, cooperation among views, which generates a joint representation by combining multiple views, is vital. Previous studies have explored promising cooperation methods for improving performance. However, since their methods focus only on the task setting of recognizing a single action from an entire video, they are not applicable to the recently popular spatio-temporal action recognition~(STAR) setting, in which each person's action is recognized sequentially. To address this problem, this paper proposes a multi-view action recognition method for the STAR setting, called MVAFormer. In MVAFormer, we introduce a novel transformer-based cooperation module among views. In contrast to previous studies, which utilize embedding vectors with lost spatial information, our module utilizes the feature map for effective cooperation in the STAR setting, which preserves the spatial information. Furthermore, in our module, we divide the self-attention for the same and different views to model the relationship between multiple views effectively. The results of experiments using a newly collected dataset demonstrate that MVAFormer outperforms the comparison baselines by approximately $4.4$ points on the F-measure.
tldr: The paper introduces MVAFormer, a transformer-based multi-view action recognition method for spatio-temporal action recognition (STAR), utilizing feature maps and differentiated self-attention for same and different views to improve performance on a new dataset.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了MVAFormer，一种基于Transformer的多视角动作识别方法，用于时空动作识别（STAR）。该方法利用特征图和区分相同视角和不同视角的自注意力机制，从而提升了在新建数据集上的性能。
summary_zh: 多视角动作识别旨在利用多个摄像机视角识别人类动作，并处理由障碍物或人群引起的遮挡。在该任务中，视角间的协作至关重要，它通过组合多个视角生成联合表示。先前的研究已探索了有前景的协作方法以提高性能。然而，由于他们的方法仅关注于从整个视频中识别单个动作的任务设置，因此它们不适用于最近流行的时空动作识别（STAR）设置，在该设置中，每个人的动作是按顺序识别的。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一种用于STAR设置的多视角动作识别方法，称为MVAFormer。在MVAFormer中，我们引入了一个新颖的基于Transformer的视角间协作模块。与先前研究利用丢失空间信息的嵌入向量不同，我们的模块利用特征图进行有效的STAR设置中的协作，从而保留了空间信息。此外，在我们的模块中，我们区分了相同视角和不同视角的自注意力机制，以有效地建模多个视角之间的关系。使用新收集的数据集进行的实验结果表明，MVAFormer在F-measure指标上比比较基线方法高出约4.4个百分点。

title: Self-Supervised Moving Object Segmentation of Sparse and Noisy Radar Point Clouds
summary: Moving object segmentation is a crucial task for safe and reliable autonomous mobile systems like self-driving cars, improving the reliability and robustness of subsequent tasks like SLAM or path planning. While the segmentation of camera or LiDAR data is widely researched and achieves great results, it often introduces an increased latency by requiring the accumulation of temporal sequences to gain the necessary temporal context. Radar sensors overcome this problem with their ability to provide a direct measurement of a point's Doppler velocity, which can be exploited for single-scan moving object segmentation. However, radar point clouds are often sparse and noisy, making data annotation for use in supervised learning very tedious, time-consuming, and cost-intensive. To overcome this problem, we address the task of self-supervised moving object segmentation of sparse and noisy radar point clouds. We follow a two-step approach of contrastive self-supervised representation learning with subsequent supervised fine-tuning using limited amounts of annotated data. We propose a novel clustering-based contrastive loss function with cluster refinement based on dynamic points removal to pretrain the network to produce motion-aware representations of the radar data. Our method improves label efficiency after fine-tuning, effectively boosting state-of-the-art performance by self-supervised pretraining.
tldr: This paper presents a self-supervised approach for moving object segmentation in sparse and noisy radar point clouds, utilizing contrastive learning and fine-tuning to improve label efficiency and performance for autonomous systems.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种自监督方法，用于在稀疏和嘈杂的雷达点云中进行运动物体分割，利用对比学习和微调来提高自主系统的标签效率和性能。
summary_zh: 移动物体分割是安全可靠的自动驾驶等自主移动系统中的一项关键任务，能够提高后续SLAM或路径规划等任务的可靠性和鲁棒性。虽然相机或激光雷达数据的分割得到了广泛的研究并取得了显著成果，但它通常需要积累时间序列以获得必要的时间上下文，从而引入了更高的延迟。雷达传感器通过其直接测量点多普勒速度的能力克服了这个问题，该速度可用于单次扫描的移动物体分割。然而，雷达点云通常是稀疏且噪声较多的，这使得用于监督学习的数据标注非常繁琐、耗时且成本高昂。为了克服这个问题，我们致力于稀疏且噪声较多的雷达点云的自监督移动物体分割任务。我们采用了一种两步法，即对比自监督表征学习，然后使用有限数量的标注数据进行监督微调。我们提出了一种新颖的基于聚类的对比损失函数，并基于动态点移除进行聚类细化，以预训练网络，从而生成雷达数据的运动感知表征。经过微调后，我们的方法提高了标签效率，通过自监督预训练有效地提升了最先进的性能。

title: Monocular absolute depth estimation from endoscopy via domain-invariant feature learning and latent consistency
summary: Monocular depth estimation (MDE) is a critical task to guide autonomous medical robots. However, obtaining absolute (metric) depth from an endoscopy camera in surgical scenes is difficult, which limits supervised learning of depth on real endoscopic images. Current image-level unsupervised domain adaptation methods translate synthetic images with known depth maps into the style of real endoscopic frames and train depth networks using these translated images with their corresponding depth maps. However a domain gap often remains between real and translated synthetic images. In this paper, we present a latent feature alignment method to improve absolute depth estimation by reducing this domain gap in the context of endoscopic videos of the central airway. Our methods are agnostic to the image translation process and focus on the depth estimation itself. Specifically, the depth network takes translated synthetic and real endoscopic frames as input and learns latent domain-invariant features via adversarial learning and directional feature consistency. The evaluation is conducted on endoscopic videos of central airway phantoms with manually aligned absolute depth maps. Compared to state-of-the-art MDE methods, our approach achieves superior performance on both absolute and relative depth metrics, and consistently improves results across various backbones and pretrained weights. Our code is available at https://github.com/MedICL-VU/MDE.
tldr: The paper presents a domain-invariant feature learning method for monocular absolute depth estimation from endoscopic videos, utilizing adversarial learning and feature consistency to bridge the gap between synthetic and real endoscopic data. It demonstrates improved performance on absolute and relative depth metrics compared to state-of-the-art methods.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种用于内窥镜视频单目绝对深度估计的域不变特征学习方法，利用对抗学习和特征一致性来弥合合成内窥镜数据与真实内窥镜数据之间的差距。结果表明，与目前最先进的方法相比，该方法在绝对和相对深度指标上都表现出更好的性能。
summary_zh: 单目深度估计 (MDE) 是引导自主医疗机器人的关键任务。然而，在手术场景中，从内窥镜相机获取绝对（度量）深度十分困难，这限制了在真实内窥镜图像上进行深度监督学习。当前的图像级无监督领域自适应方法将具有已知深度图的合成图像转换为真实内窥镜帧的风格，并使用这些翻译后的图像及其对应的深度图来训练深度网络。然而，真实图像和翻译后的合成图像之间通常仍然存在领域差异。在本文中，我们提出一种潜在特征对齐方法，通过减少中央气道内窥镜视频背景下的这种领域差异来提高绝对深度估计的性能。我们的方法与图像翻译过程无关，而专注于深度估计本身。具体而言，深度网络以翻译后的合成和真实内窥镜帧作为输入，并通过对抗学习和定向特征一致性学习潜在的领域不变特征。评估是在中央气道假体的内窥镜视频上进行的，这些视频具有手动对齐的绝对深度图。与最先进的 MDE 方法相比，我们的方法在绝对和相对深度指标上都取得了优异的性能，并在各种骨干网络和预训练权重上一致地提高了结果。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/MedICL-VU/MDE 获取。

title: Autobiasing Event Cameras for Flickering Mitigation
summary: Understanding and mitigating flicker effects caused by rapid variations in light intensity is critical for enhancing the performance of event cameras in diverse environments. This paper introduces an innovative autonomous mechanism for tuning the biases of event cameras, effectively addressing flicker across a wide frequency range -25 Hz to 500 Hz. Unlike traditional methods that rely on additional hardware or software for flicker filtering, our approach leverages the event cameras inherent bias settings. Utilizing a simple Convolutional Neural Networks -CNNs, the system identifies instances of flicker in a spatial space and dynamically adjusts specific biases to minimize its impact. The efficacy of this autobiasing system was robustly tested using a face detector framework under both well-lit and low-light conditions, as well as across various frequencies. The results demonstrated significant improvements: enhanced YOLO confidence metrics for face detection, and an increased percentage of frames capturing detected faces. Moreover, the average gradient, which serves as an indicator of flicker presence through edge detection, decreased by 38.2 percent in well-lit conditions and by 53.6 percent in low-light conditions. These findings underscore the potential of our approach to significantly improve the functionality of event cameras in a range of adverse lighting scenarios.
tldr: This paper presents an autobiasing mechanism using CNNs to mitigate flicker in event cameras by dynamically adjusting bias settings, demonstrating improved performance in face detection under various lighting conditions.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种使用卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的自偏置机制，通过动态调整偏置设置来减轻事件相机中的闪烁，并在各种光照条件下展示了改进的人脸检测性能。
summary_zh: 了解和减轻因光强快速变化引起闪烁效应对于提高事件相机在各种环境中的性能至关重要。本文介绍了一种创新的自主机制，用于调整事件相机的偏置，有效地解决了从-25 Hz到500 Hz的宽频率范围内的闪烁问题。与依赖额外硬件或软件进行闪烁滤波的传统方法不同，我们的方法利用了事件相机固有的偏置设置。该系统利用一个简单的卷积神经网络 (CNN) 在空间域中识别闪烁实例，并动态调整特定偏置以最大限度地减少其影响。通过在良好光照和低光照条件下以及各种频率下使用面部检测器框架，对该自偏置系统的有效性进行了稳健的测试。结果表明，性能得到了显著提升：面部检测的YOLO置信度指标得到增强，并且捕捉到检测到面部的帧的百分比有所增加。此外，作为通过边缘检测指示闪烁存在的平均梯度，在良好光照条件下降低了38.2%，在低光照条件下降低了53.6%。这些发现强调了我们的方法在显著提高事件相机在各种不利照明场景中的功能方面的潜力。

title: A Spatially Informed Gaussian Process UCB Method for Decentralized Coverage Control
summary: We present a novel decentralized algorithm for coverage control in unknown spatial environments modeled by Gaussian Processes (GPs). To trade-off between exploration and exploitation, each agent autonomously determines its trajectory by minimizing a local cost function. Inspired by the GP-UCB (Upper Confidence Bound for GPs) acquisition function, the proposed cost combines the expected locational cost with a variance-based exploration term, guiding agents toward regions that are both high in predicted density and model uncertainty. Compared to previous work, our algorithm operates in a fully decentralized fashion, relying only on local observations and communication with neighboring agents. In particular, agents periodically update their inducing points using a greedy selection strategy, enabling scalable online GP updates. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our algorithm in simulation.
tldr: This paper presents a decentralized coverage control algorithm for robots in unknown environments using Gaussian Process Upper Confidence Bound (GP-UCB) to balance exploration and exploitation, with scalable online GP updates.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种去中心化的覆盖控制算法，用于在未知环境中利用高斯过程上限置信界（GP-UCB）平衡探索与利用的机器人，并具有可扩展的在线GP更新。
summary_zh: 我们提出一种新颖的去中心化算法，用于在高斯过程 (GP) 建模的未知空间环境中进行覆盖控制。为了权衡探索与利用，每个智能体通过最小化局部代价函数自主地确定其轨迹。受 GP-UCB (高斯过程上置信界) 采集函数的启发，所提出的代价函数将期望位置代价与基于方差的探索项相结合，引导智能体朝向预测密度高且模型不确定性大的区域。与之前的工作相比，我们的算法以完全去中心化方式运行，仅依赖于局部观测和与相邻智能体的通信。 特别是，智能体定期使用贪婪选择策略更新其诱导点，从而实现可扩展的在线 GP 更新。我们通过仿真实验验证了算法的有效性。

title: Large-scale automatic carbon ion treatment planning for head and neck cancers via parallel multi-agent reinforcement learning
summary: Head-and-neck cancer (HNC) planning is difficult because multiple critical organs-at-risk (OARs) are close to complex targets. Intensity-modulated carbon-ion therapy (IMCT) offers superior dose conformity and OAR sparing but remains slow due to relative biological effectiveness (RBE) modeling, leading to laborious, experience-based, and often suboptimal tuning of many treatment-planning parameters (TPPs). Recent deep learning (DL) methods are limited by data bias and plan feasibility, while reinforcement learning (RL) struggles to efficiently explore the exponentially large TPP search space. We propose a scalable multi-agent RL (MARL) framework for parallel tuning of 45 TPPs in IMCT. It uses a centralized-training decentralized-execution (CTDE) QMIX backbone with Double DQN, Dueling DQN, and recurrent encoding (DRQN) for stable learning in a high-dimensional, non-stationary environment. To enhance efficiency, we (1) use compact historical DVH vectors as state inputs, (2) apply a linear action-to-value transform mapping small discrete actions to uniform parameter adjustments, and (3) design an absolute, clinically informed piecewise reward aligned with plan scores. A synchronous multi-process worker system interfaces with the PHOENIX TPS for parallel optimization and accelerated data collection. On a head-and-neck dataset (10 training, 10 testing), the method tuned 45 parameters simultaneously and produced plans comparable to or better than expert manual ones (relative plan score: RL $85.93\pm7.85%$ vs Manual $85.02\pm6.92%$), with significant (p-value $<$ 0.05) improvements for five OARs. The framework efficiently explores high-dimensional TPP spaces and generates clinically competitive IMCT plans through direct TPS interaction, notably improving OAR sparing.
tldr: This paper presents a multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) framework for automatically tuning treatment planning parameters in intensity-modulated carbon-ion therapy (IMCT) for head and neck cancers, achieving comparable or better results than expert manual planning.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种多智能体强化学习（MARL）框架，用于自动调整头颈癌强度调制碳离子治疗（IMCT）中的治疗计划参数，其结果可与专家手动计划相比或更好。
summary_zh: 头颈癌（HNC）治疗计划制定困难，因为多个关键的危及器官（OAR）与复杂的靶区临近。调强碳离子治疗（IMCT）具有卓越的剂量适形性和OAR保护能力，但由于相对生物学效应（RBE）建模，导致治疗计划参数（TPP）的调整耗时费力、依赖经验且常常欠佳。最近的深度学习（DL）方法受到数据偏差和计划可行性的限制，而强化学习（RL）则难以有效地探索指数级增长的TPP搜索空间。我们提出了一种可扩展的多智能体RL（MARL）框架，用于并行调整IMCT中的45个TPP。它使用集中式训练分散式执行（CTDE）的QMIX骨干网络，结合Double DQN、Dueling DQN和循环编码（DRQN），以在高维非平稳环境中实现稳定的学习。为了提高效率，我们（1）使用紧凑的历史DVH向量作为状态输入，（2）应用线性动作-价值转换，将小的离散动作映射到均匀的参数调整，以及（3）设计一个绝对的、临床指导的分段式奖励，使其与计划评分对齐。一个同步的多进程工作系统与PHOENIX治疗计划系统（TPS）对接，用于并行优化和加速数据收集。在一个头颈部数据集（10个训练，10个测试）上，该方法同时调整了45个参数，并生成了与专家手动计划相当或更好的计划（相对计划评分：RL $85.93\pm7.85%$ vs 手动 $85.02\pm6.92%$），且五种OAR的改善具有显著性（p值 $<$ 0.05）。该框架有效地探索了高维TPP空间，并通过直接的TPS交互生成了具有临床竞争力的IMCT计划，显著改善了OAR保护。

title: DoFlow: Causal Generative Flows for Interventional and Counterfactual Time-Series Prediction
summary: Time-series forecasting increasingly demands not only accurate observational predictions but also causal forecasting under interventional and counterfactual queries in multivariate systems. We present DoFlow, a flow based generative model defined over a causal DAG that delivers coherent observational and interventional predictions, as well as counterfactuals through the natural encoding and decoding mechanism of continuous normalizing flows (CNFs). We also provide a supporting counterfactual recovery result under certain assumptions. Beyond forecasting, DoFlow provides explicit likelihoods of future trajectories, enabling principled anomaly detection. Experiments on synthetic datasets with various causal DAG and real world hydropower and cancer treatment time series show that DoFlow achieves accurate system-wide observational forecasting, enables causal forecasting over interventional and counterfactual queries, and effectively detects anomalies. This work contributes to the broader goal of unifying causal reasoning and generative modeling for complex dynamical systems.
tldr: DoFlow, a flow-based generative model defined over a causal DAG, enables interventional, counterfactual time-series prediction and anomaly detection by providing explicit likelihoods of future trajectories.
tldr_zh: DoFlow是一种基于因果DAG的生成流模型，通过提供未来轨迹的显式似然，实现干预性和反事实的时间序列预测以及异常检测。
summary_zh: 时间序列预测日益需要在多元系统中进行精确的观测预测，以及干预和反事实查询下的因果预测。我们提出DoFlow，一个基于流的生成模型，定义在因果DAG之上，通过连续归一化流（CNF）自然的编码和解码机制，提供连贯的观测和干预预测，以及反事实推断。我们还在特定假设下提供了一个支持性的反事实恢复结果。除了预测之外，DoFlow还提供未来轨迹的显式似然，从而实现有原则的异常检测。在具有各种因果DAG的合成数据集，以及真实世界的水电和癌症治疗时间序列上的实验表明，DoFlow实现了精确的系统范围内的观测预测，能够针对干预和反事实查询进行因果预测，并有效地检测异常。这项工作有助于统一复杂动力系统的因果推理和生成建模的更广泛目标。

title: A Dual-Use Framework for Clinical Gait Analysis: Attention-Based Sensor Optimization and Automated Dataset Auditing
summary: Objective gait analysis using wearable sensors and AI is critical for managing neurological and orthopedic conditions. However, models are vulnerable to hidden dataset biases, and task-specific sensor optimization remains a challenge. We propose a multi-stream attention-based deep learning framework that functions as both a sensor optimizer and an automated data auditor. Applied to the Voisard et al. (2025) multi-cohort gait dataset on four clinical tasks (PD, OA, CVA screening; PD vs CVA differential), the model's attention mechanism quantitatively discovered a severe dataset confound. For OA and CVA screening, tasks where bilateral assessment is clinically essential, the model assigned more than 70 percent attention to the Right Foot while statistically ignoring the Left Foot (less than 0.1 percent attention, 95 percent CI [0.0-0.1]). This was not a clinical finding but a direct reflection of a severe laterality bias (for example, 15 of 15 right-sided OA) in the public dataset. The primary contribution of this work is methodological, demonstrating that an interpretable framework can automatically audit dataset integrity. As a secondary finding, the model proposes novel, data-driven sensor synergies (for example, Head plus Foot for PD screening) as hypotheses for future optimized protocols.
tldr: This paper presents a multi-stream attention-based deep learning framework for clinical gait analysis, capable of both optimizing sensor selection and auditing dataset biases, revealing a significant laterality confound in a public gait dataset.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种用于临床步态分析的多流注意力深度学习框架，该框架能够优化传感器选择并审计数据集偏差，从而揭示了公共步态数据集中的显著偏侧混淆。
summary_zh: 使用可穿戴传感器和人工智能进行客观步态分析对于管理神经和骨科疾病至关重要。然而，模型容易受到隐藏数据集偏差的影响，并且特定任务的传感器优化仍然是一个挑战。我们提出一种基于多流注意力机制的深度学习框架，该框架既可以作为传感器优化器，又可以作为自动数据审计工具。应用于Voisard等人（2025）在四项临床任务（帕金森病、骨关节炎、脑血管意外筛查；帕金森病与脑血管意外鉴别）上的多组步态数据集，该模型的注意力机制定量地发现了一个严重的数据集混淆因素。对于临床上双侧评估至关重要的骨关节炎和脑血管意外筛查任务，模型将超过70%的注意力分配给右脚，而在统计学上忽略了左脚（注意力低于0.1%，95%置信区间[0.0-0.1]）。这并非临床发现，而是直接反映了公共数据集中严重的偏侧性偏差（例如，15例骨关节炎病例中有15例为右侧）。这项工作的主要贡献是方法论上的，证明了一个可解释的框架可以自动审计数据集的完整性。作为次要发现，该模型提出了新的、数据驱动的传感器协同作用（例如，头部加脚部用于帕金森病筛查），作为未来优化方案的假设。

title: Coordinate ascent neural Kalman-MLE for state estimation
summary: This paper presents a coordinate ascent algorithm to learn dynamic and measurement models in dynamic state estimation using maximum likelihood estimation in a supervised manner. In particular, the dynamic and measurement models are assumed to be Gaussian and the algorithm learns the neural network parameters that model the dynamic and measurement functions, and also the noise covariance matrices. The trained dynamic and measurement models are then used with a non-linear Kalman filter algorithm to estimate the state during the testing phase.
tldr: The paper introduces a coordinate ascent algorithm using neural networks within a Kalman filter framework for learning dynamic and measurement models in supervised dynamic state estimation.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种坐标上升算法，该算法在卡尔曼滤波框架内使用神经网络，用于在监督动态状态估计中学习动态和测量模型。
summary_zh: 本文提出一种坐标上升算法，用于在动态状态估计中，以监督方式使用最大似然估计学习动态模型和测量模型。具体来说，假设动态模型和测量模型均为高斯模型，该算法学习对动态函数和测量函数进行建模的神经网络参数，以及噪声协方差矩阵。训练后的动态模型和测量模型随后与非线性卡尔曼滤波算法一起使用，以在测试阶段估计状态。

title: Many-vs-Many Missile Guidance via Virtual Targets
summary: This paper presents a novel approach to many-vs-many missile guidance using virtual targets (VTs) generated by a Normalizing Flows-based trajectory predictor. Rather than assigning n interceptors directly to m physical targets through conventional weapon target assignment algorithms, we propose a centralized strategy that constructs n VT trajectories representing probabilistic predictions of maneuvering target behavior. Each interceptor is guided toward its assigned VT using Zero-Effort-Miss guidance during midcourse flight, transitioning to Proportional Navigation guidance for terminal interception. This approach treats many-vs-many engagements as many-vs-distribution scenarios, exploiting numerical superiority (n > m) by distributing interceptors across diverse trajectory hypotheses rather than pursuing identical deterministic predictions. Monte Carlo simulations across various target-interceptor configurations (1-6 targets, 1-8 interceptors) demonstrate that the VT method matches or exceeds baseline straight-line prediction performance by 0-4.1% when n = m, with improvements increasing to 5.8-14.4% when n > m. The results confirm that probabilistic VTs enable effective exploitation of numerical superiority, significantly increasing interception probability in many-vs-many scenarios.
tldr: This paper introduces a many-vs-many missile guidance approach using virtual targets generated from a trajectory predictor based on normalizing flows, demonstrating improved interception probability especially when interceptors outnumber targets.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种多对多导弹制导方法，该方法利用由基于归一化流的轨迹预测器生成的虚拟目标，结果表明，尤其在拦截器数量超过目标数量时，拦截概率有所提高。
