summary_zh: 本文提出了一种基于归一化流轨迹预测器生成虚拟目标（VT）的多对多导弹制导新方法。我们没有通过传统的武器目标分配算法直接将 n 个拦截器分配给 m 个物理目标，而是提出一种集中式策略，构建 n 条 VT 轨迹，代表机动目标行为的概率预测。在飞行中段，每个拦截器使用零努力脱靶量制导飞向其分配的 VT，并在末段拦截时过渡到比例导引制导。该方法将多对多交战视为多对分布情景，通过将拦截器分布在不同的轨迹假设上，而非追求相同的确定性预测，从而利用数量优势（n > m）。在各种目标-拦截器配置（1-6 个目标，1-8 个拦截器）下的蒙特卡罗模拟表明，当 n = m 时，VT 方法与基于直线预测的基准性能相比，匹配或超出 0-4.1%，而当 n > m 时，性能提升增加到 5.8-14.4%。结果证实，概率性 VT 使我们能够有效地利用数量优势，从而显著提高多对多场景中的拦截概率。

title: ZJUNlict Extended Team Description Paper 2025
summary: This paper presents the ZJUNlict team's work over the past year, covering both hardware and software advancements. In the hardware domain, the integration of an IMU into the v2023 robot was completed to enhance posture accuracy and angular velocity planning. On the software side, key modules were optimized, including the strategy and CUDA modules, with significant improvements in decision making efficiency, ball pursuit prediction, and ball possession prediction to adapt to high-tempo game dynamics.
tldr: The ZJUNlict team outlines their robotics improvements from the past year, including IMU integration for hardware and strategic/CUDA module optimizations for software, showing advancements in decision-making and ball prediction.
tldr_zh: ZJUNlict团队总结了过去一年的机器人改进，包括硬件上的IMU集成和软件上的策略及CUDA模块优化，展示了在决策制定和球体预测方面的进展。
summary_zh: 本文介绍了ZJUNlict团队过去一年的工作，涵盖了硬件和软件两方面的进展。在硬件方面，完成了IMU集成到v2023机器人中，以提高姿态精度和角速度规划能力。在软件方面，对策略和CUDA等关键模块进行了优化，决策效率、追球预测和控球预测能力均显著提升，以适应快节奏的比赛动态。

title: An unscented Kalman filter method for real time input-parameter-state estimation
summary: The input-parameter-state estimation capabilities of a novel unscented Kalman filter is examined herein on both linear and nonlinear systems. The unknown input is estimated in two stages within each time step. Firstly, the predicted dynamic states and the system parameters provide an estimation of the input. Secondly, the corrected with measurements states and parameters provide a final estimation. Importantly, it is demonstrated using the perturbation analysis that, a system with at least a zero or a non-zero known input can potentially be uniquely identified. This output-only methodology allows for a better understanding of the system compared to classical output-only parameter identification strategies, given that all the dynamic states, the parameters, and the input are estimated jointly and in real-time.
tldr: This paper introduces a novel unscented Kalman filter method for real-time joint estimation of system states, parameters, and unknown inputs, potentially improving system understanding compared to traditional parameter identification. Perturbation analysis shows systems with known inputs are uniquely identifiable.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种新的无迹卡尔曼滤波方法，用于实时联合估计系统状态、参数和未知输入，与传统的参数识别相比，可能更好地理解系统。扰动分析表明，具有已知输入的系统可以被唯一识别。
summary_zh: 本文探讨了一种新型无迹卡尔曼滤波器在线性和非线性系统上的输入-参数-状态估计能力。在每个时间步内，未知输入分两个阶段进行估计。首先，预测的动态状态和系统参数提供输入的估计。其次，用测量值校正后的状态和参数提供最终的估计。重要的是，通过摄动分析证明，具有至少一个零输入或非零已知输入的系统有可能被唯一识别。与经典的仅输出参数识别策略相比，由于所有动态状态、参数和输入都是联合且实时估计的，因此这种仅输出方法能够更好地理解系统。

title: Predicting Weekly Fishing Concentration Zones through Deep Learning Integration of Heterogeneous Environmental Spatial Datasets
summary: The North Indian Ocean, including the Arabian Sea and the Bay of Bengal, represents a vital source of livelihood for coastal communities, yet fishermen often face uncertainty in locating productive fishing grounds. To address this challenge, we present an AI-assisted framework for predicting Potential Fishing Zones (PFZs) using oceanographic parameters such as sea surface temperature and chlorophyll concentration. The approach is designed to enhance the accuracy of PFZ identification and provide region-specific insights for sustainable fishing practices. Preliminary results indicate that the framework can support fishermen by reducing search time, lowering fuel consumption, and promoting efficient resource utilization.
tldr: This paper presents an AI framework using deep learning and oceanographic data to predict Potential Fishing Zones (PFZs) in the North Indian Ocean, aiming to improve fishing efficiency and sustainability.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种人工智能框架，该框架利用深度学习和海洋学数据来预测北印度洋的潜在渔区（PFZ），旨在提高捕鱼效率和可持续性。
summary_zh: 北印度洋，包括阿拉伯海和孟加拉湾，是沿海社区重要的生计来源，但渔民在寻找高产渔场时常常面临不确定性。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一个人工智能辅助框架，利用海面温度和叶绿素浓度等海洋学参数来预测潜在渔区（PFZ）。该方法旨在提高PFZ识别的准确性，并为可持续捕捞提供特定区域的见解。初步结果表明，该框架可以通过减少搜索时间、降低燃料消耗和促进高效资源利用来支持渔民。

title: Automatic Extraction of Road Networks by using Teacher-Student Adaptive Structural Deep Belief Network and Its Application to Landslide Disaster
summary: An adaptive structural learning method of Restricted Boltzmann Machine (RBM) and Deep Belief Network (DBN) has been developed as one of prominent deep learning models. The neuron generation-annihilation algorithm in RBM and layer generation algorithm in DBN make an optimal network structure for given input during the learning. In this paper, our model is applied to an automatic recognition method of road network system, called RoadTracer. RoadTracer can generate a road map on the ground surface from aerial photograph data. A novel method of RoadTracer using the Teacher-Student based ensemble learning model of Adaptive DBN is proposed, since the road maps contain many complicated features so that a model with high representation power to detect should be required. The experimental results showed the detection accuracy of the proposed model was improved from 40.0\% to 89.0\% on average in the seven major cities among the test dataset. In addition, we challenged to apply our method to the detection of available roads when landslide by natural disaster is occurred, in order to rapidly obtain a way of transportation. For fast inference, a small size of the trained model was implemented on a small embedded edge device as lightweight deep learning. We reported the detection results for the satellite image before and after the rainfall disaster in Japan.
tldr: This paper presents a Teacher-Student Adaptive Structural Deep Belief Network (DBN) for automatic road network extraction from aerial photographs, with an application to landslide disaster response, showing improved accuracy and lightweight implementation for edge devices.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于师生自适应结构深度信念网络（DBN）的自动道路网络提取方法，该方法可以从航空照片中提取道路网络，并应用于滑坡灾害响应。实验结果表明，该方法提高了准确性，并可在边缘设备上进行轻量化实现。
summary_zh:
摘要：
本文开发了一种受限玻尔兹曼机（RBM）和深度信念网络（DBN）的自适应结构学习方法，作为一种突出的深度学习模型。RBM中的神经元生成-湮灭算法以及DBN中的层生成算法，为给定的输入在学习过程中构建最优的网络结构。在本文中，我们的模型应用于道路网络系统的自动识别方法，称为RoadTracer。RoadTracer可以从航空照片数据中生成地面上的道路地图。鉴于道路地图包含许多复杂特征，需要具有高表征能力的模型进行检测，因此我们提出了一种使用基于Teacher-Student的自适应DBN集成学习模型的新型RoadTracer方法。实验结果表明，在测试数据集中的七个主要城市中，所提出的模型的检测精度平均从40.0\%提高到89.0\%。此外，我们还尝试将我们的方法应用于自然灾害引发的滑坡发生后，对可用道路的检测，以便快速获得运输途径。为了实现快速推理，我们将训练后的小型模型作为轻量级深度学习部署在小型嵌入式边缘设备上。我们报告了在日本降雨灾害前后，对卫星图像的检测结果。

title: Object-Centric 3D Gaussian Splatting for Strawberry Plant Reconstruction and Phenotyping
summary: Strawberries are among the most economically significant fruits in the United States, generating over $2 billion in annual farm-gate sales and accounting for approximately 13% of the total fruit production value. Plant phenotyping plays a vital role in selecting superior cultivars by characterizing plant traits such as morphology, canopy structure, and growth dynamics. However, traditional plant phenotyping methods are time-consuming, labor-intensive, and often destructive. Recently, neural rendering techniques, notably Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) and 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS), have emerged as powerful frameworks for high-fidelity 3D reconstruction. By capturing a sequence of multi-view images or videos around a target plant, these methods enable non-destructive reconstruction of complex plant architectures. Despite their promise, most current applications of 3DGS in agricultural domains reconstruct the entire scene, including background elements, which introduces noise, increases computational costs, and complicates downstream trait analysis. To address this limitation, we propose a novel object-centric 3D reconstruction framework incorporating a preprocessing pipeline that leverages the Segment Anything Model v2 (SAM-2) and alpha channel background masking to achieve clean strawberry plant reconstructions. This approach produces more accurate geometric representations while substantially reducing computational time. With a background-free reconstruction, our algorithm can automatically estimate important plant traits, such as plant height and canopy width, using DBSCAN clustering and Principal Component Analysis (PCA). Experimental results show that our method outperforms conventional pipelines in both accuracy and efficiency, offering a scalable and non-destructive solution for strawberry plant phenotyping.
tldr: This paper presents an object-centric 3D Gaussian Splatting framework utilizing SAM-2 for accurate and efficient strawberry plant reconstruction and automated phenotyping, improving upon existing scene-level approaches.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于SAM-2的以对象为中心的3D高斯溅射框架，用于准确高效地重建草莓植株并进行自动表型分析，改进了现有的场景级方法。
summary_zh: 草莓是美国最具经济意义的水果之一，年农场销售额超过20亿美元，约占水果总产值的13%。植物表型分析在通过表征植物的形态、冠层结构和生长动态等性状来选择优良品种方面发挥着至关重要的作用。然而，传统的植物表型分析方法耗时、费力且通常具有破坏性。 近来，神经渲染技术，特别是神经辐射场（NeRF）和3D高斯泼溅（3DGS），已经成为高保真3D重建的强大框架。 通过捕获目标植物周围的多视角图像或视频序列，这些方法能够实现复杂植物结构的非破坏性重建。 尽管它们前景广阔，但当前3DGS在农业领域的大多数应用都重建整个场景，包括背景元素，这会引入噪声、增加计算成本并使下游性状分析复杂化。 为了解决这一限制，我们提出了一种新颖的以对象为中心的3D重建框架，该框架结合了预处理流程，利用 Segment Anything Model v2 (SAM-2) 和 alpha 通道背景遮罩来实现清晰的草莓植株重建。 这种方法可以产生更准确的几何表示，同时大幅缩短计算时间。 通过无背景的重建，我们的算法可以使用DBSCAN聚类和主成分分析（PCA）自动估计重要的植物性状，例如株高和冠层宽度。 实验结果表明，我们的方法在准确性和效率方面均优于传统流程，为草莓植株表型分析提供了一种可扩展且非破坏性的解决方案。

title: Are Euler angles a useful rotation parameterisation for pose estimation with Normalizing Flows?
summary: Object pose estimation is a task that is of central importance in 3D Computer Vision. Given a target image and a canonical pose, a single point estimate may very often be sufficient; however, a probabilistic pose output is related to a number of benefits when pose is not unambiguous due to sensor and projection constraints or inherent object symmetries. With this paper, we explore the usefulness of using the well-known Euler angles parameterisation as a basis for a Normalizing Flows model for pose estimation. Isomorphic to spatial rotation, 3D pose has been parameterized in a number of ways, either in or out of the context of parameter estimation. We explore the idea that Euler angles, despite their shortcomings, may lead to useful models in a number of aspects, compared to a model built on a more complex parameterisation.
tldr: The paper investigates the viability of using Euler angles in Normalizing Flows for 3D object pose estimation, arguing that their simplicity might offer advantages over more complex parameterizations despite known issues.
tldr_zh: 该论文探讨在用于3D物体姿态估计的归一化流中使用欧拉角的可行性，认为尽管存在已知问题，但其简单性可能优于更复杂的参数化方法。
summary_zh: 目标位姿估计是三维计算机视觉中一项至关重要的任务。给定目标图像和规范位姿，通常一个单一的点估计就足够了；然而，当位姿由于传感器和投影约束或固有的物体对称性而存在不确定性时，概率位姿输出与许多优势相关。在本文中，我们探讨了使用众所周知的欧拉角参数化作为位姿估计归一化流模型基础的有效性。与空间旋转同构的三维位姿，已在参数估计的语境中或不在此语境中，被以多种方式进行参数化。我们探索这样一种观点，即尽管欧拉角存在不足，但与基于更复杂参数化的模型相比，它在许多方面可能适用于构建有效的模型。

title: FilletRec: A Lightweight Graph Neural Network with Intrinsic Features for Automated Fillet Recognition
summary: Automated recognition and simplification of fillet features in CAD models is critical for CAE analysis, yet it remains an open challenge. Traditional rule-based methods lack robustness, while existing deep learning models suffer from poor generalization and low accuracy on complex fillets due to their generic design and inadequate training data. To address these issues, this paper proposes an end-to-end, data-driven framework specifically for fillet features. We first construct and release a large-scale, diverse benchmark dataset for fillet recognition to address the inadequacy of existing data. Based on it, we propose FilletRec, a lightweight graph neural network. The core innovation of this network is its use of pose-invariant intrinsic geometric features, such as curvature, enabling it to learn more fundamental geometric patterns and thereby achieve high-precision recognition of complex geometric topologies. Experiments show that FilletRec surpasses state-of-the-art methods in both accuracy and generalization, while using only 0.2\%-5.4\% of the parameters of baseline models, demonstrating high model efficiency. Finally, the framework completes the automated workflow from recognition to simplification by integrating an effective geometric simplification algorithm.
tldr: The paper introduces FilletRec, a lightweight graph neural network using pose-invariant intrinsic geometric features for automated fillet recognition in CAD models, achieving state-of-the-art accuracy and generalization with high model efficiency by releasing a new dataset and integrating geometric simplification.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了FilletRec，一种轻量级图神经网络，它使用姿态不变的内在几何特征来自动识别CAD模型中的圆角特征。通过发布新的数据集并集成几何简化算法，该方法实现了最先进的精度和泛化能力，并具有很高的模型效率。
summary_zh: CAD模型中圆角特征的自动识别和简化对于CAE分析至关重要，但仍然是一个开放的挑战。传统的基于规则的方法缺乏鲁棒性，而现有的深度学习模型由于其通用设计和不足的训练数据，在复杂圆角上存在泛化能力差和精度低的问题。为了解决这些问题，本文提出了一种端到端、数据驱动的框架，专门用于圆角特征。我们首先构建并发布了一个大规模、多样化的圆角识别基准数据集，以解决现有数据的不足。基于此，我们提出了FilletRec，一个轻量级的图神经网络。该网络的核心创新在于使用姿态不变的内在几何特征，例如曲率，使其能够学习更基本的几何模式，从而实现对复杂几何拓扑的高精度识别。实验表明，FilletRec在精度和泛化能力方面都超过了最先进的方法，同时仅使用基线模型0.2\%-5.4\%的参数，表现出极高的模型效率。最后，该框架通过集成一种有效的几何简化算法，完成了从识别到简化的自动化工作流程。

title: Markerless Augmented Reality Registration for Surgical Guidance: A Multi-Anatomy Clinical Accuracy Study
summary: Purpose: In this paper, we develop and clinically evaluate a depth-only, markerless augmented reality (AR) registration pipeline on a head-mounted display, and assess accuracy across small or low-curvature anatomies in real-life operative settings. Methods: On HoloLens 2, we align Articulated HAnd Tracking (AHAT) depth to Computed Tomography (CT)-derived skin meshes via (i) depth-bias correction, (ii) brief human-in-the-loop initialization, (iii) global and local registration. We validated the surface-tracing error metric by comparing "skin-to-bone" relative distances to CT ground truth on leg and foot models, using an AR-tracked tool. We then performed seven intraoperative target trials (feet x2, ear x3, leg x2) during the initial stage of fibula free-flap harvest and mandibular reconstruction surgery, and collected 500+ data per trial. Results: Preclinical validation showed tight agreement between AR-traced and CT distances (leg: median |Delta d| 0.78 mm, RMSE 0.97 mm; feet: 0.80 mm, 1.20 mm). Clinically, per-point error had a median of 3.9 mm. Median errors by anatomy were 3.2 mm (feet), 4.3 mm (ear), and 5.3 mm (lower leg), with 5 mm coverage 92-95%, 84-90%, and 72-86%, respectively. Feet vs. lower leg differed significantly (Delta median ~1.1 mm; p < 0.001). Conclusion: A depth-only, markerless AR pipeline on HMDs achieved ~3-4 mm median error across feet, ear, and lower leg in live surgical settings without fiducials, approaching typical clinical error thresholds for moderate-risk tasks. Human-guided initialization plus global-to-local registration enabled accurate alignment on small or low-curvature targets, improving the clinical readiness of markerless AR guidance.
tldr: This paper presents and clinically validates a depth-only, markerless augmented reality registration pipeline on a head-mounted display for surgical guidance, achieving ~3-4 mm median error across small anatomies in live surgical settings.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出并临床验证了一个基于头戴式显示器的深度信息、无标识的增强现实配准管线，用于手术导航，在真实手术环境中，对小尺寸解剖结构实现了约3-4毫米的中值误差。
summary_zh: 目的：本文旨在研究并临床评估一种仅使用深度信息、无需标记点的头戴式显示器（HMD）增强现实（AR）配准流程，并评估其在真实手术环境中对小型或低曲率解剖结构的配准精度。方法：在HoloLens 2上，我们通过（i）深度偏差校正，（ii）简短的人工引导初始化，（iii）全局和局部配准，将关节手部追踪（AHAT）深度信息与计算机断层扫描（CT）衍生的皮肤网格对齐。我们使用AR追踪工具，通过比较“皮肤到骨骼”的相对距离与腿部和足部模型的CT真值来验证表面追踪误差指标。然后在腓骨游离皮瓣采集和下颌骨重建手术的初始阶段，进行了七次术中靶点试验（足部x2，耳部x3，腿部x2），每次试验收集500多个数据。结果：临床前验证表明AR追踪距离与CT距离高度一致（腿部：中位数|Δd| 0.78 mm，均方根误差 0.97 mm；足部：0.80 mm，1.20 mm）。临床上，逐点误差的中位数为3.9 mm。按解剖结构划分，中位数误差分别为足部3.2 mm，耳部4.3 mm，小腿5.3 mm，5 mm覆盖率分别为92-95%、84-90%和72-86%。足部与小腿差异显著（中位数差值约1.1 mm；p < 0.001）。结论：在无需标记点的活体手术环境中，头戴式显示器的仅深度信息、无需标记点AR流程在足部、耳部和小腿上实现了约3-4 mm的中位数误差，接近中等风险任务的典型临床误差阈值。人工引导初始化加上全局到局部配准，实现了对小型或低曲率目标的精确对齐，提高了无需标记点AR引导的临床应用准备度。

title: A Recommendation System-Based Framework for Enhancing Human-Machine Collaboration in Industrial Timetabling Rescheduling: Application in Preventive Maintenance
summary: Industrial timetabling is a critical task for decision-makers across various sectors to ensure efficient system operation. In real-world settings, it remains challenging because unexpected events often disrupt execution. When such events arise, effective rescheduling and collaboration between humans and machines becomes essential. This paper presents a recommendation system-based framework for handling rescheduling challenges, built on Timefold, a powerful AI-driven planning engine. Our experimental study evaluates nine instances inspired by a realworld preventive maintenance use case, aiming to identify the heuristic that best balances solution quality and computing time to support near-optimal decisionmaking when rescheduling is required due to unexpected events during operational days. Finally, we illustrate the complete process of our recommendation system through a simple use case.
tldr: The paper introduces a recommendation system framework, built on Timefold, to enhance human-machine collaboration in industrial timetabling rescheduling for preventive maintenance, aiming to balance solution quality and computing time when unexpected events occur.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一个基于推荐系统的框架，该框架建立在Timefold之上，旨在增强工业排程重新安排中人机协作，用于预防性维护，目的是在发生意外事件时平衡解决方案质量和计算时间。
summary_zh: 工业排程是各个领域的决策者确保系统高效运行的关键任务。在实际环境中，由于意外事件 частоinterrupt执行，它依然充满挑战。当此类事件发生时，有效重排程以及人机协作至关重要。本文提出了一种基于推荐系统的框架来处理重排程挑战，该框架构建于强大的 AI 驱动的规划引擎 Timefold 之上。我们的实验研究评估了九个受真实预防性维护用例启发的实例，旨在确定一种能够最佳平衡解决方案质量和计算时间的启发式算法，以便在因运营期间意外事件而需要重排程时支持接近最优的决策。 最后，我们通过一个简单的用例说明了推荐系统的完整过程。

title: Human-Machine Ritual: Synergic Performance through Real-Time Motion Recognition
summary: We introduce a lightweight, real-time motion recognition system that enables synergic human-machine performance through wearable IMU sensor data, MiniRocket time-series classification, and responsive multimedia control. By mapping dancer-specific movement to sound through somatic memory and association, we propose an alternative approach to human-machine collaboration, one that preserves the expressive depth of the performing body while leveraging machine learning for attentive observation and responsiveness. We demonstrate that this human-centered design reliably supports high accuracy classification (<50 ms latency), offering a replicable framework to integrate dance-literate machines into creative, educational, and live performance contexts.
tldr: This paper presents a real-time motion recognition system using wearable IMUs and MiniRocket classification to enable synergistic human-machine performance, specifically in dance and live performance contexts, offering a human-centered design with high accuracy and low latency.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一个实时运动识别系统，该系统使用可穿戴 IMU 和 MiniRocket 分类，以实现协同人机性能，特别是在舞蹈和现场表演环境中，提供了一种以人为中心的设计，具有高精度和低延迟。
summary_zh: 我们介绍了一种轻量级的实时动作识别系统，该系统利用可穿戴IMU传感器数据、MiniRocket时间序列分类和响应式多媒体控制，实现了协同的人机性能。通过体觉记忆和联想，将舞者特定的动作映射到声音，我们提出了一种人机协作的替代方案，该方案在利用机器学习进行专注观察和响应的同时，保留了表演身体的表达深度。我们证明了这种以人为中心的设计能够可靠地支持高精度分类（<50毫秒延迟），为将具有舞蹈素养的机器集成到创意、教育和现场表演环境中提供了一个可复制的框架。
